case_ch:
In May 2026, the school organized teachers to participate in a relatively long equipment operation training program. When reimbursing after returning to campus, it also submitted together the teaching equipment maintenance materials that arose during the training and the transportation and lodging receipts from the person in charge's own trip.
The training was reported under the standard for bureau-director-level and above personnel and lasted 20 days. The total of lodging, meal, venue, materials, transportation, and other expenses was RMB 18,720, including lecturer fees of RMB 2,500. The out-of-town lecturer's lodging, meal, and transportation expenses were reimbursed at RMB 600, RMB 200, and RMB 900 respectively. The "Fudan University Detailed List of Training Expense Expenditures," the trainee list, and the invoices provided by the training service provider were all complete.
The equipment maintenance matter in the same batch had already been applied for through the Asset Management Office system, and the "Fudan University Fixed Asset Maintenance Application Form" had been printed out, bearing the signatures of the relevant personnel and the official seal of the unit. However, the original invoice for the maintenance service was missing. The person in charge's own travel materials had been countersigned by another university leader. The itinerary covered 3 calendar days, with 2 nights of lodging at RMB 600 per night, a meal subsidy of RMB 300 was claimed, and a lump-sum city transportation allowance of RMB 240 was claimed. The related receipts were complete. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form".

case_ch:
In August 2026, after returning to campus, Professor Fang submitted together several materials handled during a family visit, including the transportation expenses for visiting parents, the remuneration application arising from being invited to participate in a review activity, and the receipts for small supplies temporarily purchased for keeping review records.
The family visit portion was reported under the category of an unmarried employee making the once-a-year visit to parents. The actual expense was RMB 700, and the reimbursable amount claimed was also RMB 700. The expenses included intercity transportation. However, the materials did not include the family visit application form.
The remuneration materials in the same batch included both a special lecture and on-site consulting. The lecturer was reported under the category for division-level and lower personnel, for a total of 8 class hours, with lecture fees claimed at RMB 500 per class hour. At the same time, there was also an on-site consulting arrangement lasting 2 days, with consulting fees paid at RMB 800 per day. The small purchases consisted of office stationery and drinking water, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice.

case_ch:
In June 2026, after returning to campus from an overseas academic visit, Professor Cao submitted together several consecutively occurring materials for review: the overseas travel expenses, the maintenance receipts for equipment brought back to campus, and the transportation and lodging receipts generated while connecting with a domestic itinerary.
For the overseas portion, the case was reported under the category of official overseas travel supported by research funds. The traveler was bureau-director-level and above personnel, and the air ticket was purchased according to the first-class standard. The foreign affairs approval and the overseas expense reimbursement form were both attached, and the expense form listed the registration fee, living allowance, incidental expenses, and transportation expenses.
The equipment maintenance matter after returning to campus had already first been applied for through the Asset Management Office system, and the "Fudan University Fixed Asset Maintenance Application Form" had been printed out. The form bore the signatures of the relevant personnel and had been affixed with the official seal of the unit, and the original invoice for the maintenance service was complete. The domestic travel materials during the same period already included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form," with the responsible person's signature and official seal complete. The itinerary covered 3 calendar days, with 2 nights of lodging at RMB 600 per night, a meal subsidy of RMB 300 was claimed, and city transportation expenses of RMB 180 were reimbursed on an actual basis. However, the intercity transportation receipts were missing.

case_ch:
In November 2026, after the renovation of the university history museum entered the settlement stage, the handling staff member submitted together the project settlement materials, the reception receipts generated during construction communication, and the remuneration application arising from experts reviewing the plan.
The engineering portion exceeded RMB 100,000 in amount. The original approval form, related review seals, the signature of the head of the Capital Construction Office, and the signature of the vice president in charge were all complete. This application was for final settlement payment upon project completion. The original cost review opinion and filing form were both fully attached, and the payment amount was controlled according to the contract and project progress, with no overpayment.
The reception during the same period was organized under the domestic official hospitality one-matter, one-settlement method, with 9 visitors and 3 accompanying staff members. No lodging expense was claimed separately. The working meal was controlled at RMB 100 per person per day, and the formal banquet was arranged at RMB 150 per person per occasion. However, either the official letter or the "Fudan University Domestic Official Hospitality Approval Form" was missing. The remuneration materials included both a master's dissertation defense and arrangements for an academician lecture and communication-based consulting: there were 3 reviewers, 5 defense committee members, and 1 defense secretary, with the corresponding standards of RMB 300, RMB 300, and RMB 100 per person respectively; the academician lecture covered a total of 4 class hours, with lecture fees claimed at RMB 1,400 per class hour; and expert consulting was carried out by communication, paid at RMB 80 per project.

case_ch:
In May 2026, Professor Wang traveled out to attend an academic annual meeting, and after returning to campus submitted together the travel receipts, the conference-organization-related materials, and several small purchases made before and during the conference for review.
The travel portion already included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form," with the responsible person's signature and official seal complete. The itinerary covered 3 calendar days, with 2 nights of lodging at RMB 600 per night, a meal subsidy of RMB 300 was claimed, and city transportation expenses of RMB 180 were reimbursed on an actual basis. The intercity transportation receipts and the lodging invoice were both provided.
The conference portion was organized under the category of conference activities supported by research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 2 days. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging and meals, with lodging at about RMB 500 per person per day, meals at about RMB 150 per person per day, and other expenses at about RMB 110 per person per day, for a total of about RMB 760 per person per day. The notice and agenda, budget form, expense details, sign-in sheet, and service contract or agreement were all attached. Among the small purchases during the same period, one was office stationery, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice, but there was artificial splitting of invoice amounts. Another purchase was office stationery and computer accessories, also accompanied by a sales list.

case_ch:
In July 2026, after completing a round of teaching methodology training, Professor Li submitted together the training expenses, the transportation and lodging receipts from a simultaneous trip, the accompanying remuneration materials, and the small purchases used for course preparation for review.
The training was reported under the standard for bureau-director-level and above personnel and lasted 20 days. The total of lodging, meal, venue, materials, transportation, and other expenses was RMB 18,720, including lecturer fees of RMB 2,500, along with reimbursement for an out-of-town lecturer's lodging of RMB 600, meal expenses of RMB 200, and transportation of RMB 900. The "Fudan University Detailed List of Training Expense Expenditures," the trainee list, and the invoices provided by the training service provider were all complete.
In the travel materials connected with the training, both the intercity transportation receipts and the lodging invoice were provided, and the responsible person's signature and official seal were complete. However, the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form" and the corresponding business trip approval and itinerary materials were not attached. The remuneration materials during the same period included both a special lecture and on-site consulting. The lecturer was reported under the category for division-level and lower personnel, for a total of 8 class hours, with lecture fees claimed at RMB 500 per class hour. There was also an on-site consulting arrangement lasting 2 days, with consulting fees paid at RMB 800 per day. The small purchases consisted of office stationery and drinking water, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice.

case_ch:
In May 2026, Professor Zhang submitted together multiple sets of materials from a consecutive itinerary: first a trip home to visit parents, then directly onward travel to participate in a conference and also serve as a reviewer, so the transportation and lodging receipts, conference materials, and remuneration materials were all placed in the same batch.
The family visit portion was reported under the category of an unmarried employee making the once-a-year visit to parents. The actual expense was RMB 700, and the reimbursable amount claimed was also RMB 700. The expenses included intercity transportation. However, the materials did not include the family visit application form.
In the subsequent travel materials, the person in charge's own trip had already been countersigned by another university leader. Intercity transportation was in first-class train seating, the itinerary covered 3 calendar days, there were 2 nights of lodging at RMB 600 per night, a meal subsidy of RMB 300 was claimed, and a lump-sum city transportation allowance of RMB 240 was claimed, with the related receipts complete. The conference materials were organized under the category of a domestic management conference supported by non-research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 1 day. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging and meals, with lodging at about RMB 340 per person per day, meals at about RMB 130 per person per day, and other expenses at about RMB 90 per person per day, for a total of about RMB 560 per person per day. The full set of conference materials was complete. The remuneration materials during the same period included both a doctoral dissertation defense and one lecture by bureau-level personnel, covering 4 class hours at RMB 900 per class hour. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form".

case_ch:
In September 2026, after returning from Germany following an international education exhibition, Dean Chen submitted together the overseas travel expenses, a set of conference materials organized during the same period, purchase receipts containing application software, and small supplies purchased during the trip.
The overseas portion was reported under the category of official overseas travel supported by research funds. The traveler was bureau-director-level and above personnel, and the air ticket was purchased according to the first-class standard. The foreign affairs approval and the overseas expense reimbursement form were both attached, and the expense form listed the registration fee, living allowance, incidental expenses, and transportation expenses.
The conference materials in the same batch were organized under the category of a domestic management conference supported by non-research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 1 day. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging and meals, with lodging at about RMB 340 per person per day, meals at about RMB 130 per person per day, and other expenses at about RMB 90 per person per day, for a total of about RMB 560 per person per day. The notice and agenda, budget form, expense details, sign-in sheet, and service contract or agreement were all complete. The purchase materials clearly contained application software, and the second copy of the intangible asset reimbursement form had already been fully attached. There was also another small purchase of office stationery and office furniture, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice.

case_ch:
In October 2026, when the full renovation project for the restrooms in a teaching building entered its closing stage, the handling staff member submitted together the settlement materials, the refund documents related to warranty retention, and the small purchases made during wrap-up organization.
The engineering portion exceeded RMB 100,000 in amount. The original approval form, related review seals, the signature of the head of the Capital Construction Office, and the signature of the vice president in charge were all complete. This application was for final settlement payment upon project completion, the original cost review opinion and filing form were both fully attached, and the payment amount was controlled according to the contract and project progress, with no overpayment.
In the refund materials of the same batch, the engineering or equipment invoice had been provided, the invoice had included the warranty retention portion when originally issued, Finance had issued the warranty retention receipt, there had been no quality dispute during the warranty period, the warranty retention receipt was also submitted when handling the refund, and the refund application had been signed by the department head. Among the remaining small purchases, one was office stationery and office furniture, with the seller providing a sales list together with the invoice; another was office stationery and cleaning supplies, formed through online shopping, and the online shopping transaction detail record was also retained. No "Fudan University Construction Project Cost Review Opinion" was included in that refund or warranty-retention set of materials.

case_ch:
In June 2026, after the fault handling of the NMR instrument was completed, the laboratory submitted together the maintenance service receipts, the transportation and lodging materials generated by the invited engineer's round trip, the working meal arranged on that day, and the record-keeping supplies purchased later for review.
Although the equipment maintenance matter had the "Fudan University Fixed Asset Maintenance Application Form" printed out, with the relevant signatures and the official seal of the unit, and the original invoice for the maintenance service was complete, this maintenance had not actually been applied for in advance through the Asset Management Office system.
The transportation and lodging materials related to the engineer coming to campus were organized using the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form," with the responsible person's signature and official seal complete, and the intercity transportation and lodging standards had been confirmed by the project leader, with the relevant receipts all provided. In the reception materials for that day, the official letter from the other unit, the "Fudan University Domestic Official Hospitality List," and the "Fudan University Domestic Official Hospitality Approval Form" were all complete. No lodging expense was claimed separately, and the formal banquet was arranged at RMB 150 per person per occasion. However, the working meal was controlled at RMB 120 per person per day, which was higher than the usual standard. There was also a purchase of office stationery and computer accessories, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice.

case_ch:
In September 2026, the school received peer institutions on campus for discussion, and after the event submitted together the visitor reception materials, the conference organization expenses, the small purchases made when preparing venue materials, and one expert remuneration application for review.
The visitor reception portion had already completed foreign affairs filing, and the "Fudan University Overseas Expert Work Expense Accounting Report" had been submitted. The guests were arranged in a four-star hotel under the category for guests of other ranks, and the reimbursement simultaneously included lodging, intercity transportation, routine meal expenses, banquet expenses, local transportation, gifts, and meal allowance subsidies for staff working overtime. Routine meal expenses were controlled at RMB 280 per person per day, and the banquet was arranged at RMB 280 per person per occasion.
The conference portion was organized under the category of conference activities supported by research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 2 days. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging but did not uniformly arrange meals, and the remaining conference expenses converted to about RMB 650 per person per day. The full set of conference materials was complete. The small purchases during the same period mainly consisted of office stationery and computer accessories, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice. The remuneration materials listed 6 doctoral dissertation reviewers, 6 defense committee members, and 1 defense secretary, with the corresponding standards of RMB 450, RMB 400, and RMB 150 per person respectively, and no additional lecture fees or expert consulting fees were arranged.

case_ch:
In August 2026, the school centrally organized reimbursement materials for a research methodology training activity, including remuneration formed by expert participation, the expenses of the full training period, and together with them the related transportation and lodging receipts and the supplies additionally purchased at the training site.
The remuneration materials included no dissertation review or defense fees and no lecture fees, but only an on-site consulting arrangement lasting 3 days, with consulting fees paid at RMB 350 per day.
The training portion was reported under the standard for division-level and lower personnel and lasted 25 days. The total of lodging, meal, venue, materials, transportation, and other expenses was RMB 16,950, including lecturer fees of RMB 1,200, together with reimbursement for an out-of-town lecturer's lodging of RMB 340, meal expenses of RMB 130, and transportation of RMB 500. The "Fudan University Detailed List of Training Expense Expenditures" and the trainee list were both complete, and a separate written approval was attached for the portion involving an increased standard. However, the invoices provided by the training service provider were not submitted. The travel materials related to the activity had complete receipts, and the responsible person's signature and official seal were also complete. There was also a purchase of office stationery, newspapers, and magazines, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form".

case_ch:
In September 2026, when updating centrifuge equipment, the laboratory submitted together the newly purchased materials, the maintenance receipts for old equipment, and the small purchases made while preparing the accompanying management documentation.
The purchase materials had already submitted a purchased materials warehousing confirmation form. According to the reported category, this physical item was not managed under the intangible asset standard. The maintenance matter for the old equipment had already been applied for through the Asset Management Office system, and the "Fudan University Fixed Asset Maintenance Application Form" had been printed out, with the relevant signatures and the official seal of the unit, and the original invoice for the maintenance service was complete.
Among the small purchases during the same period, one was office stationery, newspapers, and magazines, while another was office stationery. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list, but the latter involved artificial splitting of invoice amounts.

case_ch:
In October 2026, after a national academic event ended, the handling staff member submitted together the conference expenses, the meal and lodging materials formed by receiving guests during the event, the lecture remuneration during the same period, and the transportation and lodging receipts from the person in charge's own trip.
The conference portion was organized under the category of conference activities supported by research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 2 days. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging and meals, with lodging at about RMB 480 per person per day, meals at about RMB 150 per person per day, and other expenses at about RMB 100 per person per day, for a total of about RMB 730 per person per day. The full set of conference materials was complete.
The reception during the same period was organized under the domestic official hospitality one-matter, one-settlement method. The official letter from the visiting unit, the "Fudan University Domestic Official Hospitality List," and the "Fudan University Domestic Official Hospitality Approval Form" were all complete. There were 9 visitors and 3 accompanying staff members, and lodging was also arranged this time. The working meal was controlled at RMB 100 per person per day, and the formal banquet was arranged at RMB 150 per person per occasion. The remuneration materials included no dissertation review or defense fees and no expert consulting fees, but only one special lecture. The lecturer was reported under the category for division-level and lower personnel, for a total of 2 class hours, with lecture fees claimed at RMB 400 per class hour. The person in charge's own trip had been countersigned by another university leader, the related receipts were complete, and a lump-sum city transportation allowance of RMB 240 was claimed. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form".

case_ch:
In July 2026, after returning to campus from teaching methodology training in Singapore, Professor Liu submitted together the overseas travel expenses, the materials for the full training period, and the receipts for small supplies purchased on the way.
The overseas portion was reported under the category of official overseas travel supported by non-research funds. The traveler was division-level or lower personnel, and the air ticket was purchased according to the economy-class standard. The foreign affairs approval and the overseas expense reimbursement form were both attached, and the expense form listed the registration fee, living allowance, incidental expenses, and transportation expenses.
The training portion was reported under the standard for bureau-director-level and above personnel and lasted 15 days. The total of lodging, meal, venue, materials, transportation, and other expenses was RMB 13,200, including lecturer fees of RMB 1,800, and reimbursement for an out-of-town lecturer's lodging of RMB 500, meal expense of RMB 150, and transportation of RMB 400. A separate written approval was attached for the portion involving an increased standard. However, the "Fudan University Detailed List of Training Expense Expenditures" was not submitted with the package. Among the small purchases during the same period, one was office stationery and computer accessories, and another was office stationery and drinking water. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list.

case_ch:
In August 2026, after returning to campus, Professor Zhao submitted together the materials from a consecutive itinerary: first returning home under the family visit arrangement, then making a detour to attend training, and during the training also undertaking small-group tutoring work, with the transportation and lodging receipts from the return trip organized together as well.
The family visit portion was reported under the category of an unmarried employee making the once-a-year visit to parents. The actual expense was RMB 700, and the reimbursable amount claimed was also RMB 700. The expenses included intercity transportation. However, the materials did not include the family visit application form.
The training portion was reported under the standard for bureau-level personnel and lasted 25 days. The "Fudan University Detailed List of Training Expense Expenditures," the trainee list, and the invoices provided by the training service provider were all complete. The remuneration materials during the same period included no dissertation review or defense fees and no expert consulting fees, but only one special lecture by bureau-level personnel, covering 4 class hours at RMB 1,200 per class hour. The return-trip travel materials had the responsible person's signature and official seal complete, but the intercity transportation receipts were missing, although the lodging invoice had been provided. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form".

case_ch:
In June 2026, when the dormitory waterproofing project entered follow-up wrap-up processing, the handling staff member submitted together the project payment materials, the cost review documents, the warranty retention refund procedures, and the supplies additionally purchased while organizing the archives.
The engineering portion exceeded RMB 100,000 in amount. The original approval form, related review seals, the signature of the head of the Capital Construction Office, and the signature of the vice president in charge were all complete. The original construction contract had also been submitted, and the payment amount was controlled according to the contract and project progress, with no overpayment.
In the cost review materials of the same batch, the engineering or equipment invoice had been provided, the cost review opinion had already been attached, the claimed amount matched the portion to be borne by the university, the portion to be borne by the construction contractor had been listed separately, and a copy of the contractor's invoice had also been provided. In the refund materials, the invoice had already included the warranty retention portion when issued, Finance had issued the warranty retention receipt, there had been no quality dispute during the warranty period, the warranty retention receipt was submitted when handling the refund, and the refund application had been signed by the department head. There was also a purchase of office stationery and office furniture, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice. No "Fudan University Construction Project Cost Review Opinion" was included in that refund or warranty-retention set of materials.

case_ch:
In May 2026, after completing an external research trip and returning to campus, Professor Sun submitted together the transportation and lodging receipts, the reception materials formed during the research process, and the supplies temporarily purchased for on-site records and questionnaire distribution.
The travel portion already included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form," with the responsible person's signature and official seal complete. The itinerary covered 3 calendar days, with 2 nights of lodging at RMB 700 per night, a meal subsidy of RMB 300 was claimed, and city transportation expenses of RMB 180 were reimbursed on an actual basis. The intercity transportation receipts and lodging invoice were both provided.
One reception case formed during the research period was organized under the domestic official hospitality one-matter, one-settlement method, with 9 visitors and 3 accompanying staff members. No lodging expense was claimed separately. The working meal was controlled at RMB 100 per person per day, and the formal banquet was arranged at RMB 150 per person per occasion. However, either the official letter or the "Fudan University Domestic Official Hospitality Approval Form" was missing. Among the small purchases during the same period, one was office stationery and office furniture, with the seller providing a sales list together with the invoice; another was office stationery and cleaning supplies, formed through online shopping, and the online shopping transaction detail record was also retained.

case_ch:
In October 2026, the school undertook an academic activity and, after the event, submitted together the remuneration materials arising from expert participation, the conference organization expenses, and the small purchases made during venue setup and material preparation.
The remuneration materials included both a doctoral dissertation defense and one lecture by bureau-level personnel. The defense portion listed 5 reviewers, 5 defense committee members, and 1 defense secretary, with the corresponding standards of RMB 300, RMB 300, and RMB 150 per person respectively. The lecture portion covered 4 class hours, with lecture fees reported at RMB 900 per class hour.
The conference portion was organized under the category of an international conference held in China supported by non-research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 2 days. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging and meals, with lodging at about RMB 300 per person per day, meals at about RMB 200 per person per day, and other expenses at about RMB 250 per person per day, for a total of about RMB 750 per person per day. The full set of conference materials was complete. Among the small purchases during the same period, one was office stationery and cleaning supplies, formed through online shopping, and the online shopping transaction detail record was also retained; another was office stationery and computer accessories, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice.

case_ch:
In July 2026, the school arranged teachers to participate in a relatively long virtual simulation training program. After returning to campus, it submitted together the training expenses, a set of teaching items purchased during the same period, the transportation and lodging receipts from the connected itinerary, and small office purchases.
The training was reported under the standard for division-level and lower personnel and lasted 35 days. The total of lodging, meal, venue, materials, transportation, and other expenses was RMB 18,425, including lecturer fees of RMB 1,500, and reimbursement for an out-of-town lecturer's lodging of RMB 340, meal expense of RMB 130, and transportation of RMB 600. The "Fudan University Detailed List of Training Expense Expenditures," the trainee list, and the invoices provided by the training service provider were all complete. The portion exceeding 30 days was 5 days, and a separate written approval was attached for the part involving an increased standard.
The purchase materials in the same batch corresponded to physical items, and a purchased materials warehousing confirmation form had already been submitted. However, according to the reported category, this expenditure was neither managed under the fixed asset standard nor under the intangible asset standard. In the travel materials for the connected itinerary, the relevant receipts were complete, but self-driving or car rental was also used on this trip, with fuel and tolls totaling RMB 200. There was also a purchase of office stationery, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form".

case_ch:
In September 2026, the school invited a professor from another university to campus for exchange. After the event, it submitted together the lodging reception materials formed during the visit, the lecture-related remuneration, the receipts for a welcome banquet on campus, and the transportation and lodging receipts for round-trip travel.
One set of visitor materials had already completed foreign affairs filing, and the "Fudan University Overseas Expert Work Expense Accounting Report" had been submitted. The guests were arranged in a four-star hotel under the category for guests of other ranks, and the reimbursement simultaneously included lodging, intercity transportation, routine meal expenses, banquet expenses, local transportation, gifts, and meal allowance subsidies for staff working overtime. Routine meal expenses were controlled at RMB 280 per person per day, and the banquet was arranged at RMB 280 per person per occasion.
The remuneration materials included both a master's dissertation defense and arrangements for an academician lecture and on-site consulting: there were 2 reviewers, 3 defense committee members, and 1 defense secretary, with the corresponding standards of RMB 250, RMB 250, and RMB 100 per person respectively; the academician lecture covered 4 class hours at RMB 1,500 per class hour; and there was also an on-site consulting arrangement lasting 3 days, with consulting fees paid at RMB 450 per day. For the on-campus reception materials, the official letter from the visiting unit, the "Fudan University Domestic Official Hospitality List," and the "Fudan University Domestic Official Hospitality Approval Form" were all complete. No lodging expense was claimed separately, the working meal was controlled at RMB 100 per person per day, and the formal banquet was arranged at RMB 150 per person per occasion. Another set of travel materials was reported under the standard for other personnel, but business-class airfare was chosen, and the related receipts were complete. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form".

case_ch:
In June 2026, after replacing the mainboard of a large incubator, the laboratory submitted together the maintenance service materials, maintenance records and small purchases formed during acceptance, as well as the related round-trip transportation and lodging receipts.
Although the equipment maintenance matter had already been applied for through the Asset Management Office system and the original invoice for the maintenance service was also fully attached, the "Fudan University Fixed Asset Maintenance Application Form" was not submitted with the package.
Among the small purchases during the same period, one was office stationery, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice. Another was also submitted under the category of office consumables or printing-related expenses and was likewise accompanied by a sales list, but there was artificial splitting of invoice amounts. In the travel materials related to the engineer's round trip, the case was reported under the standard for other personnel but business-class airfare was chosen, and the responsible person's signature and official seal as well as the related receipts were all complete. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form".

case_ch:
In October 2026, after returning to campus from attending an annual meeting in the United States, Professor Zhou submitted together the overseas travel expenses, a set of conference materials organized during the same period, the remuneration application arising from moderating an activity, and the receipts for small supplies purchased during the meeting.
The overseas portion was reported under the category of official overseas travel supported by non-research funds. The traveler was division-level or lower personnel, and the air ticket was purchased according to the economy-class standard. The foreign affairs approval and the overseas expense reimbursement form were both attached, and the expense form listed the registration fee, living allowance, incidental expenses, and transportation expenses.
The conference materials in the same batch were organized under the category of conference activities supported by research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 2 days. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging and meals, with lodging at about RMB 500 per person per day, meals at about RMB 150 per person per day, and other expenses at about RMB 110 per person per day, for a total of about RMB 760 per person per day. The full set of conference materials was complete. The remuneration materials included no dissertation review or defense fees and no expert consulting fees, but only one special lecture by division-level and lower personnel, covering 2 class hours at RMB 400 per class hour. There was also a purchase of office stationery and computer accessories, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice.

case_ch:
In June 2026, after the renovation of the chemical laboratory ventilation system was launched, the handling staff member submitted together the initial payment application for the project, the maintenance materials for the supporting exhaust motor, and the small supplies additionally purchased during safety management.
The renovation project amount was below RMB 100,000. The original approval form, the formal seal of the Capital Construction Office, and the Project Review Seal of the Fudan University Renovation Management Office were all complete. This application followed the initial payment process, the original construction contract had also been submitted, and the payment amount was controlled according to the contract and project progress, with no overpayment. However, the initial payment itself exceeded the proportion or amount agreed in the contract.
The equipment maintenance matter in the same batch had already been applied for through the Asset Management Office system, and the "Fudan University Fixed Asset Maintenance Application Form" had been printed out, with the relevant signatures and the official seal of the unit. The original invoice for the maintenance service was also complete. There was also a purchase of office stationery and computer accessories, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice.

case_ch:
In July 2026, the school centrally organized a batch of activity materials around the theme of teaching reform, including both the conference expenses for a two-day concentrated activity and the expenditures for subsequent consecutive training, while also mixing in on-site consumables and one set of academic remuneration applications.
The conference portion was organized under the category of conference activities supported by research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 2 days. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging and meals, with lodging at about RMB 480 per person per day, meals at about RMB 150 per person per day, and other expenses at about RMB 100 per person per day, for a total of about RMB 730 per person per day. The budget form, expense details, sign-in sheet, and service contract or agreement were all complete. However, the notice and agenda were not submitted with the package.
The subsequent training was reported under the standard for bureau-level personnel and lasted 25 days. The total of lodging, meal, venue, materials, transportation, and other expenses was RMB 16,250. The "Fudan University Detailed List of Training Expense Expenditures," the trainee list, and the invoices provided by the training service provider were all complete. The on-site small purchases mainly consisted of office stationery and drinking water, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice. The remuneration materials during the same period included both a doctoral dissertation defense and one lecture by bureau-level personnel, covering 4 class hours at RMB 900 per class hour.

case_ch:
In May 2026, Professor Wu submitted together the materials from a consecutive itinerary: first returning home under the arrangement for visiting a spouse, then connecting with a research trip, and after returning also participating in a doctoral dissertation defense and arranging a special lecture, while also later claiming small supplies casually purchased during the review.
The family visit portion was reported under the category of a married employee making the once-a-year visit to a spouse. The actual expense was RMB 950, and the reimbursable amount claimed was also RMB 950. The expenses included intercity transportation. Although the actual trip was by airplane, the reimbursed amount was controlled according to the equivalent train fare for the same route. The family visit application form had completed departmental approval and had been affixed with the seal of the personnel department.
The research trip already included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form," with the responsible person's signature and official seal complete. The itinerary covered 3 calendar days, with 2 nights of lodging at RMB 700 per night, a meal subsidy of RMB 300 was claimed, and city transportation expenses of RMB 180 were reimbursed on an actual basis. The intercity transportation receipts and lodging invoice were both provided. The remuneration materials during the same period included 5 doctoral dissertation reviewers, 5 defense committee members, and 1 defense secretary, with the corresponding standards of RMB 300, RMB 300, and RMB 150 per person respectively, and also one lecture by bureau-level personnel, covering 4 class hours at RMB 900 per class hour. The small purchases were submitted under the category of office consumables or printing-related expenses, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice.

case_ch:
In June 2026, the information platform construction project centrally processed a batch of expenses related to the system launch, including purchase materials containing application software, remuneration receipts arising from academic activities during the same period, transportation and lodging receipts for invited personnel coming to campus, and small purchases made while labeling servers and cleaning up.
The purchase portion contained application software, had a unit price exceeding RMB 1,000, was expected to be used for more than 1 year, and belonged to a bulk purchase of similar items. The second copy of the fixed asset reimbursement form had already been attached, registration had been completed with the asset management department, and the second copy of the intangible asset reimbursement form was also fully attached.
The remuneration materials in the same batch listed 5 doctoral dissertation reviewers, 5 defense committee members, and 1 defense secretary, with the corresponding standards of RMB 300, RMB 300, and RMB 150 per person respectively. In addition, one bureau-level person was invited to give a special lecture for a total of 4 class hours, with lecture fees reported at RMB 900 per class hour. The accompanying transportation and lodging materials already included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form," with the responsible person's signature and official seal complete, and the intercity transportation receipts and lodging invoice were both provided. However, the actual reimbursement recipient was an invited external person, so the transportation and lodging standard had been separately confirmed by the project leader. The small purchases consisted of office stationery and cleaning supplies, formed through online shopping, and the online shopping transaction detail record was also retained.

case_ch:
In September 2026, the school received an external institution on campus for cooperation talks. On the same day, it arranged both a working meal and a formal banquet, rented a conference venue at the same time, and after the event also submitted for reimbursement the temporarily purchased reception supplies and conference material supplies.
The visitor reception was handled on a one-matter, one-settlement basis, with 9 visitors and 3 accompanying staff members. No lodging expense was claimed separately. The working meal was controlled at RMB 100 per person per day, and the formal banquet was arranged at RMB 150 per person per occasion. However, the reception materials were incomplete, with either the official letter or the "Fudan University Domestic Official Hospitality Approval Form" missing.
The same batch of materials also included an international conference held in China supported by non-research funds. The conference was organized under the Category I conference standard, with about 100 participants and a duration of 2 days. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging and meals, with lodging at about RMB 300 per person per day, meals at about RMB 200 per person per day, and other expenses at about RMB 250 per person per day, for a total of about RMB 750 per person per day. The notice and agenda, budget form, expense details, sign-in sheet, and service contract or agreement were all complete. Among the small purchases, one was office stationery and cleaning supplies, formed through online shopping, and the online shopping transaction detail record was also retained; another was office stationery and computer accessories, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice.

case_ch:
In May 2026, after returning to campus from academic exchange in Japan, Professor Zheng processed in one batch the overseas travel expenses, one physical equipment item purchased during the trip, the domestic travel receipts from the itinerary connected after returning to China, and the small supplies purchased additionally.
The overseas portion was reported under the category of official overseas travel supported by non-research funds. The traveler took business class under the standard for bureau-level personnel. The foreign affairs approval and the overseas expense reimbursement form were both attached, and the expense form listed the registration fee, living allowance, incidental expenses, and transportation expenses.
The purchase materials in the same batch corresponded to a physical item, and a purchased materials warehousing confirmation form had already been submitted. However, according to the reported category, this expenditure was neither managed under the fixed asset standard nor under the intangible asset standard. The domestic trip connected after returning to campus was organized using the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form," with the responsible person's signature and official seal complete, and both the intercity transportation receipts and the lodging invoice were provided. However, self-driving or car rental was also used on this trip, with fuel and tolls totaling RMB 200. There was also a purchase of office stationery, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice.

case_ch:
In August 2026, the Faculty Development Center centrally reimbursed a batch of expenses related to the improvement of online teaching ability, including the costs of a consecutive training program, the remuneration materials arising from an accompanying academic activity, and together with them the small receipts generated during certificate production and mailing of materials.
The training was reported under the standard for division-level and lower personnel and lasted 15 days. The total of lodging, meal, venue, materials, transportation, and other expenses was RMB 10,740, including lecturer fees of RMB 1,000. The out-of-town lecturer's lodging, meal, and transportation expenses were reimbursed at RMB 340, RMB 130, and RMB 800 respectively. The "Fudan University Detailed List of Training Expense Expenditures," the trainee list, and the invoices provided by the training service provider were all complete, and a separate written approval was attached for the portion involving an increased standard.
The remuneration materials in the same batch included both a master's dissertation defense and arrangements for lecture and consulting: there were 2 reviewers, 3 defense committee members, and 1 defense secretary, with the corresponding standards of RMB 250, RMB 250, and RMB 100 per person respectively; in addition, one academician was invited to give a special lecture for a total of 4 class hours, with lecture fees reported at RMB 1,500 per class hour, and an on-site consulting arrangement lasting 3 days was also made, with consulting fees paid at RMB 450 per day. The small purchases mainly consisted of office stationery, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice. Another set of travel materials was reported under the standard for other personnel, but business-class airfare was chosen, with the related receipts complete. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form".

case_ch:
In June 2026, while advancing a renovation project, the General Affairs Office handling staff member submitted together the project progress payment, the transportation and lodging receipts from an inspection trip, the office supplies purchased later while organizing the archives, and one set of refund materials related to the subsequent settlement of the project.
The engineering portion involved a project below RMB 100,000. The original approval form and related review seals were all complete. This application followed the initial payment process, and the payment amount was controlled according to the contract and project progress, with no overpayment. However, the original construction contract was not submitted with the package.
The inspection trip portion was organized using the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form," with the responsible person's signature and official seal complete, and both the intercity transportation receipts and the lodging invoice were provided. The remaining small purchases were office stationery, newspapers, and magazines, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice. In another set of refund materials, the invoice had included the warranty retention portion when issued, Finance had issued the warranty retention receipt, the warranty period had now expired, there had been no quality dispute during that period, the warranty retention receipt was submitted when handling the refund, and the refund application had been signed by the department head. However, the engineering or equipment invoice was not provided. No "Fudan University Construction Project Cost Review Opinion" was included in that refund or warranty-retention set of materials.

case_ch:
In April 2026, while dealing with a malfunction of an old ultra-low-temperature freezer, the laboratory submitted several related expenses together in one batch of materials: equipment maintenance receipts, a batch of purchase materials that needed to be handled under the asset category, a remuneration application arising from a short lecture, and small purchases made while preparing materials for new equipment.
The equipment maintenance matter had already first been applied for through the Asset Management Office system, and the "Fudan University Fixed Asset Maintenance Application Form" had been printed out. The form bore the signatures of the relevant personnel and had been affixed with the official seal of the unit, and the original invoice for the maintenance service was also fully attached.
The purchase materials in the same batch corresponded to books, were expected to be used for more than 1 year, and belonged to a bulk purchase of similar items. The second copy of the fixed asset reimbursement form had already been attached, and accession registration had been completed in the library. The remuneration portion included only one special lecture, with no dissertation review or defense fees and no expert consulting fees. The lecturer was reported under the category for division-level and lower personnel, for a total of 2 class hours, with lecture fees claimed at RMB 400 per class hour. The small purchases consisted of office stationery and computer accessories, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice.

case_ch:
In October 2026, the school undertook a national academic event. In the materials organized centrally after the event, there were both conference organization expenses and receipts for receiving external guests during the conference, as well as the transportation and lodging receipts generated by the person in charge traveling for the event and the small supplies additionally purchased on site.
The conference portion was charged to research project funds and was organized under the Category I conference scale, with about 100 participants and a duration of 2 days. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging and meals, with lodging at about RMB 500 per person per day, meals at about RMB 150 per person per day, and other expenses at about RMB 110 per person per day, for a total of about RMB 760 per person per day. The notice and agenda, budget form, detailed list of conference expense expenditures, sign-in sheet, and service contract or agreement were all complete.
The visitor reception during the same period was arranged under the category for guests of other ranks, with lodging in a four-star hotel. The reimbursement simultaneously included lodging, intercity transportation, routine meal expenses, banquet expenses, local transportation, gifts, and meal allowance subsidies for staff working overtime. The foreign affairs filing had already been completed, but the "Fudan University Overseas Expert Work Expense Accounting Report" was not submitted. Routine meal expenses were controlled at RMB 280 per person per day, and the banquet was arranged at RMB 280 per person per occasion. The person in charge's own trip had been countersigned by another university leader, the related receipts were complete, and a lump-sum city transportation allowance of RMB 240 was claimed. The small purchases consisted of office stationery and drinking water, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form".

case_ch:
In May 2026, Professor He handled a sequence of personal travel materials in the same reimbursement: first the transportation expenses for returning home to visit parents, then the formalities for overseas travel, and in between some small purchases for visa preparation and routine office supplies were also attached.
The family visit portion was reported under the category of an unmarried employee making the once-a-year visit to parents. The actual expense was RMB 700, and the reimbursable amount claimed was also RMB 700. The expenses included intercity transportation. However, the materials did not include the family visit application form.
The subsequent overseas travel was reported under the category of official overseas travel supported by research funds. The traveler took first-class airfare under the standard for bureau-director-level and above personnel. The foreign affairs approval and the overseas expense reimbursement form were both attached, and the expense form listed the registration fee, living allowance, incidental expenses, and transportation expenses. Among the small purchases during the same period, one was office stationery and drinking water and another was office stationery. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list.

case_ch:
In November 2026, the school invited external experts to campus for a consecutive training program. After the event, it submitted together the lecture and consulting remuneration, the training organization expenses, the meal-related reception materials for that day, and the related transportation and lodging receipts.
The remuneration materials included no dissertation review or defense fees, but only one relatively long special lecture and on-site consulting. The lecturer was reported under the category for division-level and lower personnel, for a total of 8 class hours, with lecture fees claimed at RMB 500 per class hour. At the same time, an on-site consulting arrangement lasting 2 days was also made, with consulting fees paid at RMB 800 per day.
The training portion was reported under the standard for bureau-level personnel and lasted 40 days. The total of lodging, meal, venue, materials, transportation, and other expenses was RMB 29,250. The "Fudan University Detailed List of Training Expense Expenditures," the trainee list, and the invoices provided by the training service provider were all complete, and the portion exceeding 30 days was 10 days. There was also a domestic official hospitality case on the same day, handled on a one-time event basis, with 9 visitors and 3 accompanying staff members. No lodging expense was claimed separately. The working meal was controlled at RMB 100 per person per day, and the formal banquet was arranged at RMB 150 per person per occasion. However, either the official letter or the "Fudan University Domestic Official Hospitality Approval Form" was missing. In the transportation and lodging materials for the experts coming to campus, the actual reimbursement recipient was an invited external person, so the transportation and lodging standard had been confirmed by the project leader. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form".

case_ch:
In May 2026, Professor Ma traveled out to participate in a project review, and after returning to campus submitted together the transportation and lodging receipts from the journey, the printing-related expenses incurred while preparing materials before the meeting, the small office purchases used during the meeting, and the conference-related materials.
The travel portion was reported using the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form," with the responsible person's signature and official seal complete. The traveler was an ordinary business traveler. The itinerary covered 3 calendar days, with 2 nights of lodging away from campus at RMB 700 per night, a meal subsidy of RMB 300 was claimed, and city transportation expenses of RMB 180 were reimbursed on an actual basis. The intercity transportation receipts and lodging invoice were both provided.
Among the small receipts related to preparation for the review, one part consisted of office stationery submitted under the category of office consumables or printing-related expenses, while the other part included both office stationery and office furniture. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list. The conference materials during the same period were organized under the category of conference activities supported by research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 2 days. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging but did not uniformly arrange meals, and the remaining conference expenses converted to about RMB 650 per person per day. The full set of conference materials was complete.

case_ch:
In June 2026, when the renovation of the laboratory animal facility reached a payment stage, the handling staff member brought together to Finance the project payment materials, the accompanying cost review documents, the maintenance receipts for an autoclave in the same area, and the supplies purchased while recording inspections.
The renovation project amount exceeded RMB 100,000. The original approval form and related review seals were all complete, and the payment amount was controlled according to the contract and project progress, with no overpayment. However, because the amount had reached the threshold requiring university leader approval, the materials still lacked the signature of the vice president in charge.
The cost review materials submitted together with the project already included the cost review opinion, and the claimed amount matched the portion to be borne by the university. However, the engineering or equipment invoice was not provided. The other equipment maintenance matter had already been applied for through the Asset Management Office system, and the "Fudan University Fixed Asset Maintenance Application Form" had been printed out, with the relevant signatures and the official seal of the unit, and the original invoice for the maintenance service was complete. The small purchases consisted of office stationery and computer accessories, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice. The accompanying cost review file explicitly included the "Fudan University Construction Project Cost Review Opinion".

case_ch:
In September 2026, in order to build a remote exchange platform, the school centrally processed a batch of expenses related to an online academic activity, including equipment purchase materials, one conference organization expense, the round-trip transportation and lodging receipts of the debugging personnel, and one technical consulting remuneration application.
The purchase portion had already submitted a purchased materials warehousing confirmation form. However, according to the reported category, this physical item was neither managed under the fixed asset standard nor under the intangible asset standard.
The conference portion was charged to research project funds and was organized under the Category I conference scale, with about 100 participants and a duration of 2 days. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging at about RMB 500 per person per day, the conference did not uniformly arrange meals, and the remaining conference expenses converted to about RMB 650 per person per day. The notice and agenda, budget form, detailed list of conference expense expenditures, sign-in sheet, and service contract or agreement were all complete. The debugging personnel's trip was organized using the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form," with the responsible person's signature and official seal complete, and the related receipts were provided. However, self-driving or car rental was also used on this trip, with fuel and tolls totaling RMB 200. The remuneration materials listed 6 doctoral dissertation reviewers, 6 defense committee members, and 1 defense secretary, with the corresponding standards of RMB 450, RMB 400, and RMB 150 per person respectively.

case_ch:
In August 2026, after returning from an academic activity in Korea, Professor Shen submitted together the overseas travel expenses, the remuneration materials arising from an academic activity held on the same occasion, and the small purchases made while preparing display materials before the event.
The overseas portion was reported under the category of official overseas travel supported by non-research funds. The traveler was division-level or lower personnel, and the air ticket was purchased according to the economy-class standard. The foreign affairs approval and the overseas expense reimbursement form were both attached, and the expense form listed the registration fee, living allowance, incidental expenses, and transportation expenses.
The remuneration materials in the same batch included both a master's dissertation defense and a high-level lecture and on-site consulting arrangement: there were 2 reviewers, 3 defense committee members, and 1 defense secretary, with the corresponding standards of RMB 250, RMB 250, and RMB 100 per person respectively; in addition, one academician was invited to give a special lecture for a total of 4 class hours, with lecture fees reported at RMB 1,500 per class hour, and an on-site consulting arrangement lasting 3 days was made, with consulting fees paid at RMB 450 per day. Among the small purchases during the same period, one was office stationery, and the other was office stationery, newspapers, and magazines. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list.

case_ch:
In July 2026, after returning to campus, Professor Qian submitted together a sequence of matters: first a training program lasting 25 days, then the round-trip transportation expenses for visiting parents, and finally the small office supplies and paper materials purchased during remote study.
The training portion was reported under the standard for division-level and lower personnel. The total of lodging, meal, venue, materials, transportation, and other expenses was RMB 16,950, including lecturer fees of RMB 1,200. The out-of-town lecturer's lodging, meal, and transportation expenses were reimbursed at RMB 340, RMB 130, and RMB 500 respectively. The "Fudan University Detailed List of Training Expense Expenditures" and the trainee list were both complete, and a separate written approval was attached for the portion involving an increased standard. However, the invoices provided by the training service provider were not submitted.
The family visit portion was reported under the category of an unmarried employee making the once-a-year visit to parents. The actual expense was RMB 800, and the reimbursable amount claimed was also RMB 800. The expenses included intercity transportation, and the family visit application form had completed departmental approval and had been affixed with the seal of the personnel department. Among the remaining small purchases, one was office stationery, newspapers, and magazines, and another was office stationery. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list, but the latter involved artificial splitting of invoice amounts.

case_ch:
In October 2026, the school received an overseas visiting scholar on campus for exchange. After the event, it submitted together the reception materials formed that day, the overseas expert expense documents during the visit, the remuneration application for one special lecture, and the transportation and lodging receipts from the person in charge's own trip.
The on-campus reception on that day was organized under the domestic official hospitality one-matter, one-settlement method, with 9 visitors and 3 accompanying staff members. The official letter from the visiting unit, the "Fudan University Domestic Official Hospitality List," and the "Fudan University Domestic Official Hospitality Approval Form" were all complete. No lodging expense was claimed separately. The working meal was controlled at RMB 100 per person per day, and the formal banquet was arranged at RMB 150 per person per occasion.
At the same time, the overseas visitor reception materials had already completed foreign affairs filing, and the "Fudan University Overseas Expert Work Expense Accounting Report" had been submitted. The guests were arranged in a four-star hotel under the category for guests of other ranks, and the reimbursement simultaneously included lodging, intercity transportation, routine meal expenses, banquet expenses, local transportation, gifts, and meal allowance subsidies for staff working overtime. Routine meal expenses were controlled at RMB 320 per person per day, and the banquet was arranged at RMB 280 per person per occasion. There was also remuneration for one special lecture, with the lecturer reported under the category for division-level and lower personnel, for a total of 2 class hours, at RMB 400 per class hour. The person in charge's own trip had been countersigned by another university leader, the related receipts were complete, and a lump-sum city transportation allowance of RMB 240 was claimed. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form".

case_ch:
In June 2026, while dealing with a malfunction of a flow cytometer, the laboratory brought for reimbursement the maintenance service receipts, the transportation and lodging receipts generated while coordinating the repair, and the small consumables purchased during the maintenance process.
The equipment maintenance matter had already first been applied for through the Asset Management Office system, and the "Fudan University Fixed Asset Maintenance Application Form" had been printed out. The form bore the signatures of the relevant personnel and had been affixed with the official seal of the unit, and the original invoice for the maintenance service was also fully attached.
The travel materials organized together with the repair coordination were charged to research project funds. Intercity transportation was in first-class train seating, the itinerary covered 3 calendar days, there were 2 nights of lodging at RMB 600 per night, a meal subsidy of RMB 300 was claimed, and city transportation expenses of RMB 180 were reimbursed on an actual basis. The receipts had the responsible person's signature and official seal complete, and both the intercity transportation receipts and the lodging invoice were provided. However, the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form" and the corresponding business trip approval and itinerary materials were not attached. Among the small purchases during the same period, one was office stationery and computer accessories, and the other was office stationery and drinking water. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list.

case_ch:
In October 2026, the school held an annual on-campus academic meeting. After the event, it submitted together several concentrated expenses, including the conference organization expenses, the small supplies purchased for venue setup and material organization, and the remuneration for a high-level special lecture arranged during the annual meeting.
The conference portion was organized under the category of conference activities supported by research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 2 days. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging and meals, with lodging at about RMB 480 per person per day, meals at about RMB 150 per person per day, and other expenses at about RMB 100 per person per day, for a total of about RMB 730 per person per day. The budget form, expense details, sign-in sheet, and service contract or agreement were all complete. However, the notice and agenda were not submitted with the package.
Among the small purchases related to venue materials, one was office stationery and computer accessories, and the other was office stationery. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list. The remuneration materials during the same period included no dissertation review or defense fees and no expert consulting fees, but only one special lecture. The lecturer was reported under the category for bureau-level personnel, for a total of 4 class hours, with lecture fees claimed at RMB 1,200 per class hour.

case_ch:
In June 2026, when handling follow-up matters for a renovation project, the school submitted together the project payment materials, the cost review documents related to the portion to be borne by the university, the transportation and lodging receipts organized during the same period, and the office supplies additionally purchased while recording rectification work.
The engineering portion exceeded RMB 100,000 in amount. The original approval form, related review seals, the signature of the head of the Capital Construction Office, and the signature of the vice president in charge were all complete. This application followed the initial payment process, the original construction contract had also been submitted, and the payment amount was controlled according to the contract and project progress, with no overpayment.
The cost review materials in the same batch already included the cost review opinion, the engineering or equipment invoice had been provided, the claimed amount matched the portion to be borne by the university, the portion to be borne by the construction contractor had been listed separately, and a copy of the contractor's invoice had also been provided. Another set of travel materials was organized using the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form," with the responsible person's signature and official seal complete. The itinerary covered 3 calendar days, with 2 nights of lodging at RMB 600 per night, a meal subsidy of RMB 300 was claimed, and city transportation expenses of RMB 180 were reimbursed on an actual basis. However, the intercity transportation receipts were missing. There was also a purchase of office stationery and office furniture, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice. The accompanying cost review file explicitly included the "Fudan University Construction Project Cost Review Opinion".

case_ch:
In May 2026, Professor Xu submitted together the materials for a consecutive itinerary: first returning home under the family visit arrangement, then connecting with a research trip, and also participating in a short conference, while small purchases made when preparing exchange materials were attached as well.
The family visit portion was reported according to the prescribed cycle for a married employee visiting a spouse. The actual expense was RMB 920, and the reimbursable amount claimed was also RMB 920. However, the expenses listed only city transportation. The family visit application form had completed departmental approval and had been affixed with the seal of the personnel department.
The subsequent research trip already included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form," with the responsible person's signature and official seal complete. The itinerary covered 3 calendar days, with 2 nights of lodging at RMB 600 per night, a meal subsidy of RMB 300 was claimed, and city transportation expenses of RMB 180 were reimbursed on an actual basis, but the intercity transportation receipts were missing. The conference materials during the same period were organized under the category of an international conference held in China supported by non-research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 2 days. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging and meals, with lodging at about RMB 300 per person per day, meals at about RMB 200 per person per day, and other expenses at about RMB 250 per person per day, for a total of about RMB 750 per person per day. The notice and agenda, budget form, expense details, sign-in sheet, and service contract or agreement were all complete. The small purchases consisted of office stationery and cleaning supplies, formed through online shopping, and the online shopping transaction detail record was also retained.

case_ch:
In September 2026, when updating analytical equipment, the laboratory submitted together several related expenses: one purchase containing application software, the maintenance receipts for a sensor of old equipment, the consulting remuneration generated when an engineer was invited on site for calibration, and the small supplies additionally purchased while recording the calibration process.
The purchase materials clearly included application software, and the second copy of the intangible asset reimbursement form had already been fully attached. The old equipment maintenance matter had already first been applied for through the Asset Management Office system, and the "Fudan University Fixed Asset Maintenance Application Form" had been printed out. The form bore the signatures of the relevant personnel and had been affixed with the official seal of the unit, and the original invoice for the maintenance service was also fully attached.
The remuneration materials in the same batch included no dissertation review or defense fees and no lecture fees, but only an on-site consulting arrangement lasting 3 days, with consulting fees paid at RMB 350 per day. The small purchases consisted of office stationery and computer accessories, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice.

case_ch:
In August 2026, the school submitted together multiple sets of materials arising from an activity in Australia, including overseas travel expenses, the expenditures of a consecutive training program, the conference materials from meetings attended during the same period, and another set of remuneration materials.
The overseas portion was reported under the category of official overseas travel supported by non-research funds. The traveler was bureau-level personnel, and the air ticket was purchased according to the business-class standard. The foreign affairs approval and the overseas expense reimbursement form were both attached, and the expense form listed the registration fee, living allowance, incidental expenses, and transportation expenses.
The training portion was reported under the standard for division-level and lower personnel and lasted 15 days. The total of lodging, meal, venue, materials, transportation, and other expenses was RMB 10,740, including lecturer fees of RMB 1,000, together with reimbursement for an out-of-town lecturer's lodging of RMB 340, meal expenses of RMB 130, and transportation of RMB 800. The "Fudan University Detailed List of Training Expense Expenditures," the trainee list, and the invoices provided by the training service provider were all complete, and a separate written approval was attached for the portion involving an increased standard. The conference materials during the same period were organized under the category of conference activities supported by research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 2 days. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging and meals, and the overall materials were complete. However, although foreign guests attended, no foreign affairs approval was seen. Another set of remuneration materials listed 6 doctoral dissertation reviewers, 6 defense committee members, and 1 defense secretary, with the corresponding standards of RMB 450, RMB 400, and RMB 150 per person respectively.

case_ch:
In June 2026, after project acceptance was completed, the handling staff member submitted together several sets of materials arising from experts coming on site to participate in the acceptance, including expert consulting remuneration, the working meal arranged that day, the related round-trip transportation and lodging receipts, and the small reference supplies used while organizing the acceptance materials.
The remuneration materials included no dissertation review or defense fees and no lecture fees, but only an on-site consulting arrangement lasting 3 days, with consulting fees paid at RMB 350 per day.
The reception on that day was organized under the domestic official hospitality one-matter, one-settlement method, with 9 visitors and 3 accompanying staff members. No lodging expense was claimed separately. The working meal was controlled at RMB 100 per person per day, and the formal banquet was arranged at RMB 150 per person per occasion. However, either the official letter or the "Fudan University Domestic Official Hospitality Approval Form" was missing. The related travel materials were submitted using the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form," with the responsible person's signature and official seal complete, and both the intercity transportation receipts and the lodging invoice were provided. The small purchases consisted of office stationery, newspapers, and magazines, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice.
