case_ch:
In July 2026, after the renovation of the office area in the administrative building was launched, the handling staff member submitted together the project payment application, several small supplies purchased during construction, and another set of refund materials related to the project's subsequent settlement.
The engineering portion involved a project below RMB 100,000. The original approval form and related review seals were all complete. This application followed the initial payment process, and the payment amount was controlled according to the contract and project progress, with no overpayment. However, the original construction contract was not submitted with the package.
Among the small purchases during the same period, one part was office stationery, while another part was office stationery, newspapers, and magazines. Both sets of materials were organized under the category of office consumables or printing-related expenses, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice. In another set of refund materials, the invoice had already included the warranty retention portion when issued, Finance had issued the warranty retention receipt, the warranty period had now expired, there had been no quality dispute during that period, the warranty retention receipt was submitted when handling the refund, and the refund application had been signed by the department head. However, the engineering or equipment invoice was not provided. No "Fudan University Construction Project Cost Review Opinion" was included in that refund or warranty-retention set of materials.

case_ch:
In September 2026, while preparing a large international exchange event, the school included in the same reimbursement batch the conference expenses, a set of purchase materials handled under the asset category during the same period, the small receipts generated while preparing conference materials, and the transportation and lodging materials for the person in charge's own trip.
The conference portion was organized under the category of conference activities supported by research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 2 days. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging and meals, with lodging at about RMB 480 per person per day, meals at about RMB 150 per person per day, and other expenses at about RMB 100 per person per day, for a total of about RMB 730 per person per day. The notice and agenda, budget form, expense details, sign-in sheet, and service contract or agreement were all attached.
The purchase materials in the same batch corresponded to books, were expected to be used for more than 1 year, and belonged to a bulk purchase of similar items. The second copy of the fixed asset reimbursement form had already been attached, and accession registration had been completed in the library. Another small purchase related to preparing the materials was submitted under the category of office consumables or printing-related expenses, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice. However, there was artificial splitting of invoice amounts. The person in charge's own trip had been countersigned by another university leader, the related receipts were complete, and a lump-sum city transportation allowance of RMB 240 was claimed. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form".

case_ch:
In May 2026, the school organized teachers to participate in a relatively long equipment operation training program. When reimbursing after returning to campus, it also submitted together the teaching equipment maintenance materials that arose during the training, the transportation and lodging receipts from the person in charge's own trip, and the supplies purchased additionally on site.
The training was reported under the standard for bureau-director-level and above personnel and lasted 20 days. The total of lodging, meal, venue, materials, transportation, and other expenses was RMB 18,720, including lecturer fees of RMB 2,500, together with reimbursement for an out-of-town lecturer's lodging of RMB 600, meal expenses of RMB 200, and transportation of RMB 900. The "Fudan University Detailed List of Training Expense Expenditures," the trainee list, and the invoices provided by the training service provider were all complete.
The equipment maintenance matter in the same batch had already been applied for through the Asset Management Office system, and the "Fudan University Fixed Asset Maintenance Application Form" had been printed out, bearing the signatures of the relevant personnel and the official seal of the unit. However, the original invoice for the maintenance service was missing. The person in charge's own trip had been countersigned by another university leader. The itinerary covered 3 calendar days, with 2 nights of lodging at RMB 600 per night, a meal subsidy of RMB 300 was claimed, and a lump-sum city transportation allowance of RMB 240 was claimed, with the related receipts complete. There was also a purchase of office stationery and drinking water, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form".

case_ch:
In August 2026, after returning to campus, Professor Fang submitted together several materials handled during a family visit, including the transportation expenses for visiting parents, the remuneration application arising from being invited to participate in a review activity, and the receipts for small supplies temporarily purchased for review records and standards compilation.
The family visit portion was reported under the category of an unmarried employee making the once-a-year visit to parents. The actual expense was RMB 700, and the reimbursable amount claimed was also RMB 700. The expenses included intercity transportation. However, the materials did not include the family visit application form.
The remuneration materials in the same batch included both a special lecture and on-site consulting. The lecturer was reported under the category for division-level and lower personnel, for a total of 8 class hours, with lecture fees claimed at RMB 500 per class hour. At the same time, there was also an on-site consulting arrangement lasting 2 days, with consulting fees paid at RMB 800 per day. Among the small purchases, one was office stationery and drinking water, and the other was office stationery. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list.

case_ch:
In June 2026, after returning to campus from an overseas academic visit, Professor Cao submitted together several consecutively occurring materials for review: the overseas travel expenses, the maintenance receipts for equipment brought back to campus, the transportation and lodging receipts generated while connecting with a domestic itinerary, and a small purchase invoice issued when protective supplies were bought additionally.
For the overseas portion, the case was reported under the category of official overseas travel supported by research funds. The traveler was bureau-director-level and above personnel, and the air ticket was purchased according to the first-class standard. The foreign affairs approval and the overseas expense reimbursement form were both attached, and the expense form listed the registration fee, living allowance, incidental expenses, and transportation expenses.
The equipment maintenance matter after returning to campus had already been applied for through the Asset Management Office system, and the "Fudan University Fixed Asset Maintenance Application Form" had been printed out, with the relevant signatures and the official seal of the unit, and the original invoice for the maintenance service was complete. The domestic travel materials during the same period already included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form," with the responsible person's signature and official seal complete. The itinerary covered 3 calendar days, with 2 nights of lodging at RMB 600 per night, a meal subsidy of RMB 300 was claimed, and city transportation expenses of RMB 180 were reimbursed on an actual basis. However, the intercity transportation receipts were missing. The small purchase was office stationery and office furniture, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice.

case_ch:
In November 2026, after the renovation of the university history museum entered the settlement stage, the handling staff member submitted together the project settlement materials, the reception receipts generated during construction communication, the remuneration application arising from experts reviewing the plan, and the related round-trip transportation and lodging receipts.
The engineering portion exceeded RMB 100,000 in amount. The original approval form, related review seals, the signature of the head of the Capital Construction Office, and the signature of the vice president in charge were all complete. This application was for final settlement payment upon project completion. The original cost review opinion and filing form were both fully attached, and the payment amount was controlled according to the contract and project progress, with no overpayment.
The reception during the same period was organized under the domestic official hospitality one-matter, one-settlement method, with 9 visitors and 3 accompanying staff members. No lodging expense was claimed separately. The working meal was controlled at RMB 100 per person per day, and the formal banquet was arranged at RMB 150 per person per occasion. However, either the official letter or the "Fudan University Domestic Official Hospitality Approval Form" was missing. The remuneration materials included both a master's dissertation defense and arrangements for an academician lecture and communication-based consulting: there were 3 reviewers, 5 defense committee members, and 1 defense secretary, with the corresponding standards of RMB 300, RMB 300, and RMB 100 per person respectively; the academician lecture covered a total of 4 class hours, with lecture fees claimed at RMB 1,400 per class hour; and expert consulting was carried out by communication, paid at RMB 80 per project. There was also another set of travel materials with complete receipts, but a lump-sum city transportation allowance of RMB 500 was claimed. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form".

case_ch:
In May 2026, after returning to campus from an academic activity, Professor Wang submitted together the transportation and lodging receipts, the conference organization materials, the small purchases made while preparing materials before the meeting, and one set of purchase receipts containing application software.
The travel portion already included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form," with the responsible person's signature and official seal complete. The itinerary covered 3 calendar days, with 2 nights of lodging at RMB 600 per night, a meal subsidy of RMB 300 was claimed, and city transportation expenses of RMB 180 were reimbursed on an actual basis. The intercity transportation receipts and the lodging invoice were both provided. The conference portion was organized under the category of conference activities supported by research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 2 days. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging and meals, with lodging at about RMB 500 per person per day, meals at about RMB 150 per person per day, and other expenses at about RMB 110 per person per day, for a total of about RMB 760 per person per day. The full set of conference materials was complete.
Among the small purchases during the same period, one was office stationery, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice, but there was artificial splitting of invoice amounts. Another purchase was office stationery and computer accessories, also accompanied by a sales list. Another set of purchase materials clearly contained application software, had a unit price exceeding RMB 1,000, was expected to be used for more than 1 year, and belonged to a bulk purchase of similar items. The second copy of the fixed asset reimbursement form and the second copy of the intangible asset reimbursement form had both been attached, and registration had been completed with the asset management department.

case_ch:
In July 2026, after completing a round of teaching methodology training, Professor Li submitted together the training expenses, the transportation and lodging receipts from a simultaneous trip, the small purchases made while preparing materials, and the materials for a relatively long conference.
The training was reported under the standard for bureau-director-level and above personnel and lasted 20 days. The total of lodging, meal, venue, materials, transportation, and other expenses was RMB 18,720, including lecturer fees of RMB 2,500, together with reimbursement for an out-of-town lecturer's lodging of RMB 600, meal expenses of RMB 200, and transportation of RMB 900. The "Fudan University Detailed List of Training Expense Expenditures," the trainee list, and the invoices provided by the training service provider were all complete. In the travel materials connected with the training, both the intercity transportation receipts and the lodging invoice were provided, and the responsible person's signature and official seal were also complete. However, the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form" and the corresponding business trip approval and itinerary materials were not attached.
Among the small purchases during the same period, one was office stationery and computer accessories, and the other was office stationery and drinking water. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list. The conference materials were organized under the category of conference activities supported by research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 3 days. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging and meals, with lodging at about RMB 480 per person per day, meals at about RMB 150 per person per day, and other expenses at about RMB 100 per person per day, for a total of about RMB 730 per person per day. The full set of conference materials was complete.

case_ch:
In May 2026, Professor Zhang submitted together the materials from a consecutive itinerary: first returning home to visit parents, then directly onward travel to participate in a conference, while the transportation and lodging receipts and the conference and supporting materials were all placed in the same batch.
The family visit portion was reported under the category of an unmarried employee making the once-a-year visit to parents. The actual expense was RMB 700, and the reimbursable amount claimed was also RMB 700. The expenses included intercity transportation. However, the materials did not include the family visit application form. In the subsequent travel materials, the person in charge's own trip had already been countersigned by another university leader. Intercity transportation was in first-class train seating, the itinerary covered 3 calendar days, there were 2 nights of lodging at RMB 600 per night, a meal subsidy of RMB 300 was claimed, and a lump-sum city transportation allowance of RMB 240 was claimed, with the related receipts complete.
The conference materials were organized under the category of a domestic management conference supported by non-research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 1 day. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging and meals, with lodging at about RMB 340 per person per day, meals at about RMB 130 per person per day, and other expenses at about RMB 90 per person per day, for a total of about RMB 560 per person per day. The full set of conference materials was complete. Among the small purchases during the same period, one was office stationery, and the other was office stationery and office furniture. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form".

case_ch:
In September 2026, after returning from Germany following an international education exhibition, Dean Chen submitted together the overseas travel expenses, a set of conference materials organized during the same period, purchase receipts containing application software, and the small supplies purchased additionally while setting up the exhibition booth.
The overseas portion was reported under the category of official overseas travel supported by research funds. The traveler was bureau-director-level and above personnel, and the air ticket was purchased according to the first-class standard. The foreign affairs approval and the overseas expense reimbursement form were both attached, and the expense form listed the registration fee, living allowance, incidental expenses, and transportation expenses. The conference materials were organized under the category of a domestic management conference supported by non-research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 1 day. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging and meals, with lodging at about RMB 340 per person per day, meals at about RMB 130 per person per day, and other expenses at about RMB 90 per person per day, for a total of about RMB 560 per person per day. The full set of conference materials was complete.
The purchase materials clearly contained application software, and the second copy of the intangible asset reimbursement form had already been fully attached. Among the small purchases during the same period, one was office stationery and office furniture, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice; another was office stationery and cleaning supplies, formed through online shopping, and the online shopping transaction detail record was also retained.

case_ch:
In October 2026, when the full renovation project for the restrooms in a teaching building entered its closing stage, the handling staff member submitted together the settlement materials, the refund documents related to warranty retention, the small purchases made during wrap-up organization, and the transportation and lodging receipts generated while inspecting materials.
The engineering portion exceeded RMB 100,000 in amount. The original approval form, related review seals, the signature of the head of the Capital Construction Office, and the signature of the vice president in charge were all complete. This application was for final settlement payment upon project completion. The original cost review opinion and filing form were both fully attached, and the payment amount was controlled according to the contract and project progress, with no overpayment. In the refund materials, the engineering or equipment invoice had been provided, the invoice had included the warranty retention portion when originally issued, Finance had issued the warranty retention receipt, there had been no quality dispute during the warranty period, the warranty retention receipt was submitted when handling the refund, and the refund application had been signed by the department head.
Among the remaining small purchases, one was office stationery and office furniture, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice; another was office stationery and cleaning supplies, formed through online shopping, and the online shopping transaction detail record was also retained. There was also another set of travel materials with complete receipts, but self-driving or car rental was used on this trip, with fuel and tolls totaling RMB 200. No "Fudan University Construction Project Cost Review Opinion" was included in that refund or warranty-retention set of materials.

case_ch:
In June 2026, after the fault handling of the NMR instrument was completed, the laboratory submitted together the maintenance service receipts, the transportation and lodging materials generated by the invited engineer's round trip, the working meal arranged on that day, and the record-keeping supplies purchased later.
Although the equipment maintenance matter had the "Fudan University Fixed Asset Maintenance Application Form" printed out, with the relevant signatures and the official seal of the unit, and the original invoice for the maintenance service was complete, this maintenance had not actually been applied for in advance through the Asset Management Office system. The transportation and lodging materials related to the engineer coming to campus were organized using the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form," with the responsible person's signature and official seal complete, and the intercity transportation and lodging standards had been confirmed by the project leader, with the relevant receipts all provided.
In the reception materials for that day, the official letter from the other unit, the "Fudan University Domestic Official Hospitality List," and the "Fudan University Domestic Official Hospitality Approval Form" were all complete. No lodging expense was claimed separately, and the formal banquet was arranged at RMB 150 per person per occasion. However, the working meal was controlled at RMB 120 per person per day, which was higher than the usual standard. Among the small purchases, one was office stationery and computer accessories, and the other was office stationery. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list.

case_ch:
In September 2026, the school received peer institutions on campus for discussion, and after the event submitted together the visitor reception materials, the conference organization expenses, the related transportation and lodging receipts, and the small purchases made when preparing venue materials.
The visitor reception portion had already completed foreign affairs filing, and the "Fudan University Overseas Expert Work Expense Accounting Report" had been submitted. The guests were arranged in a four-star hotel under the category for guests of other ranks, and the reimbursement simultaneously included lodging, intercity transportation, routine meal expenses, banquet expenses, local transportation, gifts, and meal allowance subsidies for staff working overtime. Routine meal expenses were controlled at RMB 280 per person per day, and the banquet was arranged at RMB 280 per person per occasion. The conference portion was organized under the category of conference activities supported by research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 2 days. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging but did not uniformly arrange meals, and the remaining conference expenses converted to about RMB 650 per person per day. The full set of conference materials was complete.
Among the small purchases during the same period, one was office stationery and computer accessories, and the other was office stationery, newspapers, and magazines. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list. There was also another set of travel materials with complete receipts, reported under the standard for ordinary business travelers. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form".

case_ch:
In August 2026, after returning to campus, Professor Zhao submitted together the materials from a consecutive itinerary: first making a detour to attend a short-term training program, then organizing the transportation and lodging receipts on the return trip, and afterward attaching the round-trip transportation expenses for visiting parents and the purchase slips for study materials.
The training portion was reported under the standard for division-level and lower personnel and lasted 15 days. The total of lodging, meal, venue, materials, transportation, and other expenses was RMB 10,740, including lecturer fees of RMB 1,000, together with reimbursement for an out-of-town lecturer's lodging of RMB 340, meal expenses of RMB 130, and transportation of RMB 800. The "Fudan University Detailed List of Training Expense Expenditures," the trainee list, and the invoices provided by the training service provider were all complete, and a separate written approval was attached for the portion involving an increased standard. In the set of travel materials connected with the training, the receipts were complete, but self-driving or car rental was also used on this trip, with fuel and tolls totaling RMB 200.
Among the small purchases, one was office stationery, and the other was office stationery, newspapers, and magazines. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list. The family visit portion was reported under the category of an unmarried employee making the once-a-year visit to parents. The actual expense was RMB 700, and the reimbursable amount claimed was also RMB 700. The expenses included intercity transportation. However, the materials did not include the family visit application form. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form".

case_ch:
In September 2026, when updating centrifuge equipment, the laboratory submitted together the newly purchased materials, the maintenance receipts for old equipment, the small purchases made while preparing the accompanying management documentation, and the transportation and lodging materials.
The purchase materials had already submitted a purchased materials warehousing confirmation form. According to the reported category, this physical item was not managed under the intangible asset standard. The maintenance matter for the old equipment had already been applied for through the Asset Management Office system, and the "Fudan University Fixed Asset Maintenance Application Form" had been printed out, with the relevant signatures and the official seal of the unit, and the original invoice for the maintenance service was complete.
Among the small purchases during the same period, one was office stationery, newspapers, and magazines, while another was office stationery. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list, but the latter involved artificial splitting of invoice amounts. There was also another set of travel materials for the person in charge's own trip, which had been countersigned by another university leader, with the related receipts complete and a lump-sum city transportation allowance of RMB 240 claimed. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form".

case_ch:
In October 2026, after a national academic event ended, the handling staff member submitted together the conference expenses, the meal and lodging materials formed by receiving guests during the event, the round-trip transportation and lodging receipts for experts, and the small purchases made while preparing venue materials.
The conference portion was organized under the category of conference activities supported by research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 2 days. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging and meals, with lodging at about RMB 480 per person per day, meals at about RMB 150 per person per day, and other expenses at about RMB 100 per person per day, for a total of about RMB 730 per person per day. The full set of conference materials was complete. The reception during the same period was organized under the domestic official hospitality one-matter, one-settlement method. The official letter from the visiting unit, the "Fudan University Domestic Official Hospitality List," and the "Fudan University Domestic Official Hospitality Approval Form" were all complete. There were 9 visitors and 3 accompanying staff members, and lodging was also arranged this time. The working meal was controlled at RMB 100 per person per day, and the formal banquet was arranged at RMB 150 per person per occasion.
In the related travel materials, the intercity transportation receipts and lodging invoice were provided. However, the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form" and the corresponding business trip approval and itinerary materials were not attached. Among the small purchases, one was office stationery and computer accessories, and the other was office stationery and drinking water. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list.

case_ch:
In July 2026, after returning to campus from teaching methodology training in Singapore, Professor Liu submitted together the overseas travel expenses, the materials for the full training period, the receipts for small supplies purchased on the way, and one set of purchase materials containing application software.
The overseas portion was reported under the category of official overseas travel supported by non-research funds. The traveler was division-level or lower personnel, and the air ticket was purchased according to the economy-class standard. The foreign affairs approval and the overseas expense reimbursement form were both attached, and the expense form listed the registration fee, living allowance, incidental expenses, and transportation expenses. The training portion was reported under the standard for bureau-director-level and above personnel and lasted 15 days. The total of lodging, meal, venue, materials, transportation, and other expenses was RMB 13,200, including lecturer fees of RMB 1,800, together with reimbursement for an out-of-town lecturer's lodging of RMB 500, meal expense of RMB 150, and transportation of RMB 400. A separate written approval was attached for the portion involving an increased standard. However, the "Fudan University Detailed List of Training Expense Expenditures" was not submitted with the package.
Among the small purchases during the same period, one was office stationery and computer accessories, and the other was office stationery and drinking water. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list. Another set of purchase materials clearly contained application software, and the second copy of the intangible asset reimbursement form had already been fully attached.

case_ch:
In June 2026, while organizing a batch of cross-category materials, the handling staff member submitted together the family visit transportation expenses, the receipts for a consecutive training program, the small purchases, and one set of transportation and lodging receipts generated by an invited external person coming to campus.
The family visit portion was reported under the category of an unmarried employee making the once-a-year visit to parents. The actual expense was RMB 700, and the reimbursable amount claimed was also RMB 700. The expenses included intercity transportation. However, the materials did not include the family visit application form. The training portion was reported under the standard for bureau-level personnel and lasted 25 days. The "Fudan University Detailed List of Training Expense Expenditures," the trainee list, and the invoices provided by the training service provider were all complete.
Among the small purchases, one was office stationery and drinking water, and the other was office stationery. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list. Another set of travel materials was organized using the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form," with the responsible person's signature and official seal complete, and both the intercity transportation receipts and the lodging invoice were provided. However, the actual reimbursement recipient was an invited external person, so the transportation and lodging standard had been confirmed by the project leader.

case_ch:
In June 2026, when the school centrally handled follow-up matters for a renovation project, it submitted together the project payment materials, the cost review documents, the warranty retention refund procedures, the small purchases made while organizing materials, and another set of transportation and lodging receipts from an external trip.
The engineering portion exceeded RMB 100,000 in amount. The original approval form, related review seals, the signature of the head of the Capital Construction Office, and the signature of the vice president in charge were all complete. This application followed the initial payment process, the original construction contract had also been submitted, and the payment amount was controlled according to the contract and project progress, with no overpayment. In the cost review materials related to the portion to be borne by the university, the engineering or equipment invoice had been provided, the cost review opinion had already been attached, the claimed amount matched the portion to be borne by the university, the portion to be borne by the construction contractor had been listed separately, and a copy of the contractor's invoice had also been provided. In the refund materials, the invoice had already included the warranty retention portion when issued, Finance had issued the warranty retention receipt, there had been no quality dispute during the warranty period, the warranty retention receipt was also submitted when handling the refund, and the refund application had been signed by the department head.
There was also a purchase of office stationery and office furniture, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice. In another set of travel materials submitted in the same batch, the responsible person's signature and official seal were complete, and the intercity transportation receipts and lodging invoice were both complete. However, a lump-sum city transportation allowance of RMB 500 was claimed. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form". No "Fudan University Construction Project Cost Review Opinion" was included in that refund or warranty-retention set of materials.

case_ch:
In August 2026, the school submitted in one batch a number of materials that originally belonged to different matters, including transportation and lodging receipts from a teacher's external trip, one reception case, two sets of small purchases, and one conference organization expense.
The travel portion already included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form," with the responsible person's signature and official seal complete. The itinerary covered 3 calendar days, with 2 nights of lodging at RMB 700 per night, a meal subsidy of RMB 300 was claimed, and city transportation expenses of RMB 180 were reimbursed on an actual basis. The intercity transportation receipts and the lodging invoice were both provided. The reception portion was organized under the domestic official hospitality one-matter, one-settlement method, with 9 visitors and 3 accompanying staff members. No lodging expense was claimed separately. The working meal was controlled at RMB 100 per person per day, and the formal banquet was arranged at RMB 150 per person per occasion. However, either the official letter or the "Fudan University Domestic Official Hospitality Approval Form" was missing.
Among the small purchases, one was office stationery and office furniture, and the other was office stationery and cleaning supplies, with the latter formed through online shopping and accompanied by the online shopping transaction detail record. The conference materials were organized under the category of conference activities supported by research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 2 days. The overall materials were complete, but although foreign guests attended, no foreign affairs approval was seen.

case_ch:
In October 2026, after inviting a professor from another university to campus for exchange, the school submitted together the relevant remuneration materials, the organization expenses of one conference event, and several small purchases made while preparing the venue.
The remuneration materials included both a doctoral dissertation defense and one lecture by bureau-level personnel. The defense portion listed 5 reviewers, 5 defense committee members, and 1 defense secretary, with the corresponding standards of RMB 300, RMB 300, and RMB 150 per person respectively. The lecture portion covered 4 class hours, with lecture fees reported at RMB 900 per class hour. The conference materials were organized under the category of an international conference held in China supported by non-research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 2 days. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging and meals, with lodging at about RMB 300 per person per day, meals at about RMB 200 per person per day, and other expenses at about RMB 250 per person per day, for a total of about RMB 750 per person per day. The full set of conference materials was complete.
Among the small purchases during the same period, one was office stationery and cleaning supplies, formed through online shopping, and the online shopping transaction detail record was also retained; the other two were office stationery and computer accessories, and standalone office stationery, with sales lists provided together with the invoices.

case_ch:
In July 2026, the school centrally organized reimbursement materials for an equipment-use training activity, including the expenses of a relatively long training program, one materials purchase, the accompanying travel receipts, and two sets of small office purchases.
The training was reported under the standard for division-level and lower personnel and lasted 35 days. The total of lodging, meal, venue, materials, transportation, and other expenses was RMB 18,425, including lecturer fees of RMB 1,500, together with reimbursement for an out-of-town lecturer's lodging of RMB 340, meal expenses of RMB 130, and transportation of RMB 600. The "Fudan University Detailed List of Training Expense Expenditures," the trainee list, and the invoices provided by the training service provider were all complete. The portion exceeding 30 days was 5 days, and a separate written approval was attached for the part involving an increased standard. The purchase materials during the same period corresponded to physical items, and a purchased materials warehousing confirmation form had already been submitted. However, according to the reported category, this expenditure was neither managed under the fixed asset standard nor under the intangible asset standard.
In the travel materials connected with the activity, the receipts were complete, but self-driving or car rental was also used on this trip, with fuel and tolls totaling RMB 200. Among the small purchases, one was office stationery, and the other was office stationery, newspapers, and magazines. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form".

case_ch:
In September 2026, the school submitted in one batch several sets of materials that originally belonged to different matters, including overseas visitor reception receipts, one set of academic remuneration, one domestic official hospitality case, and two travel cases under different standards.
The overseas visitor reception materials had already completed foreign affairs filing, and the "Fudan University Overseas Expert Work Expense Accounting Report" had been submitted. The guests were arranged in a four-star hotel under the category for guests of other ranks, and the reimbursement simultaneously included lodging, intercity transportation, routine meal expenses, banquet expenses, local transportation, gifts, and meal allowance subsidies for staff working overtime. Routine meal expenses were controlled at RMB 280 per person per day, and the banquet was arranged at RMB 280 per person per occasion. The remuneration materials included both a master's dissertation defense and arrangements for an academician lecture and on-site consulting: there were 2 reviewers, 3 defense committee members, and 1 defense secretary, with the corresponding standards of RMB 250, RMB 250, and RMB 100 per person respectively; the academician lecture covered 4 class hours at RMB 1,500 per class hour; and there was also an on-site consulting arrangement lasting 3 days, with consulting fees paid at RMB 450 per day.
For the on-campus reception materials, the official letter from the visiting unit, the "Fudan University Domestic Official Hospitality List," and the "Fudan University Domestic Official Hospitality Approval Form" were all complete. No lodging expense was claimed separately, the working meal was controlled at RMB 100 per person per day, and the formal banquet was arranged at RMB 150 per person per occasion. Among the two travel cases, one was reported under the standard for other personnel but business-class airfare was chosen, while the other was reported under the standard for bureau-director-level personnel and persons of equivalent rank in first-class train seating. However, the latter lacked the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form" and the corresponding business trip approval and itinerary materials.

case_ch:
In June 2026, the school submitted in one batch several sets of materials that were not of the same nature, including one equipment maintenance case, two small purchases, one set of travel receipts, and the materials for a short conference.
Although the equipment maintenance matter had already been applied for through the Asset Management Office system and the original invoice for the maintenance service had also been fully attached, the "Fudan University Fixed Asset Maintenance Application Form" was not submitted with the package. Among the small purchases, one was office stationery, and the other was also submitted under the category of office consumables or printing-related expenses, but there was artificial splitting of invoice amounts. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list. In the related travel materials, the case was reported under the standard for other personnel but business-class airfare was chosen, with the responsible person's signature and official seal as well as the related receipts all complete.
The conference materials in the same batch were organized under the category of a domestic management conference supported by research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 1 day. The conference did not uniformly arrange lodging, but conference services uniformly arranged meals. Meal expenses were about RMB 130 per person per day, other expenses about RMB 80 per person per day, for a total of about RMB 210 per person per day. The full set of conference materials was complete. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form".

case_ch:
In July 2026, the school submitted together several sets of materials from originally different activities, including one overseas travel expense, one two-day conference organization expense, one short lecture remuneration, and two sets of small purchases made on site.
The overseas portion was reported under the category of official overseas travel supported by non-research funds. The traveler was division-level or lower personnel, and the air ticket was purchased according to the economy-class standard. The foreign affairs approval and the overseas expense reimbursement form were both attached, and the expense form listed the registration fee, living allowance, incidental expenses, and transportation expenses. The conference portion was organized under the category of conference activities supported by research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 2 days. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging and meals, with lodging at about RMB 500 per person per day, meals at about RMB 150 per person per day, and other expenses at about RMB 110 per person per day, for a total of about RMB 760 per person per day. The full set of conference materials was complete.
The remuneration materials included no dissertation review or defense fees and no expert consulting fees, but only one special lecture by division-level and lower personnel, covering 2 class hours at RMB 400 per class hour. Among the small purchases, one was office stationery and computer accessories, and the other was office stationery and drinking water. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list.

case_ch:
In June 2026, the school centrally submitted together multiple follow-up materials for one renovation project, including the project's initial payment, the supporting equipment maintenance receipts, two small purchases, and one set of warranty retention refund procedures.
The engineering portion involved a project below RMB 100,000. The original approval form, the formal seal of the Capital Construction Office, and the Project Review Seal of the Fudan University Renovation Management Office were all complete. This application followed the initial payment process, the original construction contract had also been submitted, and the payment amount was controlled according to the contract and project progress, with no overpayment. However, the initial payment itself exceeded the proportion or amount agreed in the contract. The supporting equipment maintenance matter had already been applied for through the Asset Management Office system, and the "Fudan University Fixed Asset Maintenance Application Form" had been printed out, with the relevant signatures and the official seal of the unit. However, the original invoice for the maintenance service was missing.
Among the small purchases, one was office stationery and computer accessories, and the other was office stationery and drinking water. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list. In the refund materials, the engineering or equipment invoice had been provided, the invoice had already included the warranty retention portion when issued, Finance had issued the warranty retention receipt, there had been no quality dispute during the warranty period, the warranty retention receipt was submitted when handling the refund, and the refund application had been signed by the department head. No "Fudan University Construction Project Cost Review Opinion" was included in that refund or warranty-retention set of materials.

case_ch:
In June 2026, the school submitted together in one batch several sets of materials that were not of the same nature, including one conference organization expense, one consecutive training program, one set of travel receipts, and two small purchases made while organizing materials.
The conference portion was organized under the category of conference activities supported by research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 2 days. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging and meals, with lodging at about RMB 480 per person per day, meals at about RMB 150 per person per day, and other expenses at about RMB 100 per person per day, for a total of about RMB 730 per person per day. However, the notice and agenda were not submitted with the package. The training portion was reported under the standard for bureau-level personnel and lasted 25 days. The "Fudan University Detailed List of Training Expense Expenditures," the trainee list, and the invoices provided by the training service provider were all complete.
The travel materials during the same period already included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form," with the responsible person's signature and official seal complete. The itinerary covered 3 calendar days, with 2 nights of lodging at RMB 700 per night, a meal subsidy of RMB 300 was claimed, and city transportation expenses of RMB 180 were reimbursed on an actual basis. The intercity transportation receipts and lodging invoice were both provided. Among the small purchases, one was office stationery, and the other was office stationery and office furniture. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list.

case_ch:
In May 2026, the school handled in one submission several sets of materials from different matters, including one family visit transportation expense, one set of research travel receipts, one set of academic remuneration, and two small purchases for venue and reception use.
The family visit portion was reported under the category of a married employee making the once-a-year visit to a spouse. The actual expense was RMB 950, and the reimbursable amount claimed was also RMB 950. The expenses included intercity transportation. Although the actual trip was by airplane, the reimbursed amount was controlled according to the equivalent train fare for the same route. The family visit application form had completed departmental approval and had been affixed with the seal of the personnel department. The research trip already included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form," with the responsible person's signature and official seal complete. The itinerary covered 3 calendar days, with 2 nights of lodging at RMB 700 per night, a meal subsidy of RMB 300 was claimed, and city transportation expenses of RMB 180 were reimbursed on an actual basis. The intercity transportation receipts and lodging invoice were both provided.
The remuneration materials during the same period included 5 doctoral dissertation reviewers, 5 defense committee members, and 1 defense secretary, with the corresponding standards of RMB 300, RMB 300, and RMB 150 per person respectively, and also one lecture by bureau-level personnel, covering 4 class hours at RMB 900 per class hour. Among the small purchases, one was office stationery and office furniture, and the other was office stationery and cleaning supplies, with the latter formed through online shopping and accompanied by the online shopping transaction detail record.

case_ch:
In June 2026, the project team submitted together a batch of materials related to system construction and external affairs, including purchase receipts containing application software, one set of academic remuneration, transportation and lodging receipts for invited external personnel coming to campus, and two small purchases.
The purchase materials clearly contained application software, had a unit price exceeding RMB 1,000, were expected to be used for more than 1 year, and belonged to a bulk purchase of similar items. The second copy of the fixed asset reimbursement form and the second copy of the intangible asset reimbursement form had both been fully attached, and registration had been completed with the asset management department. The remuneration materials during the same period listed 5 doctoral dissertation reviewers, 5 defense committee members, and 1 defense secretary, with the corresponding standards of RMB 300, RMB 300, and RMB 150 per person respectively. In addition, one bureau-level person was arranged to give a special lecture for a total of 4 class hours, with lecture fees reported at RMB 900 per class hour.
The accompanying transportation and lodging materials already included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form," with the responsible person's signature and official seal complete, and the intercity transportation receipts and lodging invoice were both provided. However, the actual reimbursement recipient was an invited external person, so the transportation and lodging standard had been separately confirmed by the project leader. Among the small purchases, one was office stationery and cleaning supplies, formed through online shopping, and the online shopping transaction detail record was also retained; the other was office stationery and computer accessories, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice.

case_ch:
In June 2026, the school centrally submitted together a batch of cross-category materials, including one domestic official hospitality case, one international conference held in China, two small purchases, and one set of research travel receipts.
The reception portion was organized under the domestic official hospitality one-matter, one-settlement method, with 9 visitors and 3 accompanying staff members. No lodging expense was claimed separately. The working meal was controlled at RMB 100 per person per day, and the formal banquet was arranged at RMB 150 per person per occasion. However, either the official letter or the "Fudan University Domestic Official Hospitality Approval Form" was missing. The conference portion was organized under the category of an international conference held in China supported by non-research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 2 days. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging and meals, with lodging at about RMB 300 per person per day, meals at about RMB 200 per person per day, and other expenses at about RMB 250 per person per day, for a total of about RMB 750 per person per day. The full set of conference materials was complete.
Among the small purchases, one was office stationery and cleaning supplies, formed through online shopping, and the online shopping transaction detail record was also retained; the other was office stationery and computer accessories, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice. There was also another set of research travel materials with complete receipts and a completed responsible person's signature and official seal. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form".

case_ch:
In May 2026, the school submitted together in one batch several originally unrelated materials, including one overseas travel expense, one physical purchase, one set of research travel receipts, and two small purchases related to organizing materials.
The overseas portion was reported under the category of official overseas travel supported by non-research funds. The traveler was bureau-level personnel, and the air ticket was purchased according to the business-class standard. The foreign affairs approval and the overseas expense reimbursement form were both attached, and the expense form listed the registration fee, living allowance, incidental expenses, and transportation expenses. The purchase materials corresponded to a physical item, and a purchased materials warehousing confirmation form had already been submitted. However, according to the reported category, this expenditure was neither managed under the fixed asset standard nor under the intangible asset standard. In the accompanying research travel materials, the receipts were complete, but self-driving or car rental was also used on this trip, with fuel and tolls totaling RMB 200.
Among the small purchases, one was office stationery, and the other was office stationery, newspapers, and magazines. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form".

case_ch:
In August 2026, the school submitted together several sets of materials from different sources, including one training expense, one set of academic remuneration, the related travel materials, and two small purchases.
The training portion was reported under the standard for division-level and lower personnel and lasted 15 days. The total of lodging, meal, venue, materials, transportation, and other expenses was RMB 10,740, including lecturer fees of RMB 1,000, together with reimbursement for an out-of-town lecturer's lodging of RMB 340, meal expenses of RMB 130, and transportation of RMB 800. The "Fudan University Detailed List of Training Expense Expenditures," the trainee list, and the invoices provided by the training service provider were all complete, and a separate written approval was attached for the portion involving an increased standard. The remuneration materials included both a master's dissertation defense and arrangements for an academician lecture and on-site consulting: there were 2 reviewers, 3 defense committee members, and 1 defense secretary, with the corresponding standards of RMB 250, RMB 250, and RMB 100 per person respectively; the academician lecture covered 4 class hours at RMB 1,500 per class hour; and there was also an on-site consulting arrangement lasting 3 days, with consulting fees paid at RMB 450 per day.
Among the small purchases, one was office stationery, and the other was also submitted under the category of office consumables or printing-related expenses, but there was artificial splitting of invoice amounts. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list. Another set of travel materials was reported under the standard for other personnel, but business-class airfare was chosen, with the related receipts complete. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form".

In July 2026, the school submitted together the follow-up materials of one project and one set of transportation and lodging receipts, while also mixing in two small purchases and one set of warranty retention refund documents.
The engineering portion involved a project below RMB 100,000. The original approval form and related review seals were all complete. This application followed the initial payment process, and the payment amount was controlled according to the contract and project progress, with no overpayment. However, the original construction contract was not submitted with the package. Another set of travel materials submitted in the same batch had complete receipts and a completed responsible person's signature and official seal. Among the small purchases, one was office stationery, newspapers, and magazines, and the other was office stationery. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list, but the latter involved artificial splitting of invoice amounts.
In the refund materials, the engineering or equipment invoice had been provided, the invoice had already included the warranty retention portion when issued, Finance had issued the warranty retention receipt, the warranty period had now expired, there had been no quality dispute during that period, the warranty retention receipt was submitted when handling the refund, the refund application had been signed by the department head, the cost review opinion had already been attached, the claimed amount matched the portion to be borne by the university, and the portion to be borne by the construction contractor had been listed separately. The accompanying cost review file explicitly included the "Fudan University Construction Project Cost Review Opinion".

case_ch:
In May 2026, the school centrally submitted a batch of equipment-related materials, including one equipment maintenance case, purchase materials handled under the asset category, one set of research travel receipts, and two small purchases made at the training site.
The equipment maintenance matter had already been applied for through the Asset Management Office system, and the "Fudan University Fixed Asset Maintenance Application Form" had been printed out. The form bore the signatures of the relevant personnel and had been affixed with the official seal of the unit, and the original invoice for the maintenance service was complete. The purchase materials corresponded to books, were expected to be used for more than 1 year, and belonged to a bulk purchase of similar items. The second copy of the fixed asset reimbursement form had already been attached, and accession registration had been completed in the library. In the related travel materials, both the intercity transportation receipts and the lodging invoice were provided, and the responsible person's signature and official seal were complete. However, the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form" and the corresponding business trip approval and itinerary materials were not attached.
Among the small purchases, one was office stationery and computer accessories, and the other was office stationery and drinking water. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list.

case_ch:
In September 2026, the school centrally submitted a batch of cross-category materials, including one conference, one set of visitor reception materials, the transportation and lodging receipts from the person in charge's own trip, and two small purchases.
The conference portion was organized under the category of conference activities supported by research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 2 days. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging and meals, with lodging at about RMB 500 per person per day, meals at about RMB 150 per person per day, and other expenses at about RMB 110 per person per day, for a total of about RMB 760 per person per day. The full set of conference materials was complete. The visitor reception portion was arranged under the category for guests of other ranks, with lodging in a four-star hotel. The reimbursement simultaneously included lodging, intercity transportation, routine meal expenses, banquet expenses, local transportation, gifts, and meal allowance subsidies for staff working overtime. The foreign affairs filing had already been completed, but the "Fudan University Overseas Expert Work Expense Accounting Report" was not submitted. Routine meal expenses were controlled at RMB 280 per person per day, and the banquet was arranged at RMB 280 per person per occasion.
The person in charge's own trip had already been countersigned by another university leader, the related receipts were complete, and a lump-sum city transportation allowance of RMB 240 was claimed. Among the small purchases, one was office stationery and drinking water, and the other was office stationery. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form".

case_ch:
In August 2026, the school handled in one reimbursement batch a number of materials that were originally unrelated, including one family visit transportation expense, one set of overseas travel expenses, two small purchases, and one set of transportation and lodging receipts generated by an invited external person coming to campus.
The family visit portion was reported under the category of an unmarried employee making the once-a-year visit to parents. The actual expense was RMB 700, and the reimbursable amount claimed was also RMB 700. The expenses included intercity transportation. However, the materials did not include the family visit application form. The overseas portion was reported under the category of official overseas travel supported by research funds. The traveler was bureau-director-level and above personnel, and the air ticket was purchased according to the first-class standard. The foreign affairs approval and the overseas expense reimbursement form were both attached, and the expense form listed the registration fee, living allowance, incidental expenses, and transportation expenses.
Among the small purchases, one was office stationery and drinking water, and the other was office stationery. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list. Another set of travel materials was organized using the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form," with the responsible person's signature and official seal complete, and the related receipts were all provided. However, the actual reimbursement recipient was an invited external person, so the transportation and lodging standard had been confirmed by the project leader.

case_ch:
In September 2026, the school submitted in one batch several sets of materials that originally belonged to different matters, including one set of academic remuneration, one long training program, one domestic official hospitality case, and two travel cases under different standards.
The remuneration materials included no dissertation review or defense fees, but only one relatively long special lecture and on-site consulting. The lecturer was reported under the category for division-level and lower personnel, for a total of 8 class hours, with lecture fees claimed at RMB 500 per class hour. At the same time, an on-site consulting arrangement lasting 2 days was also made, with consulting fees paid at RMB 800 per day. The training portion was reported under the standard for bureau-level personnel and lasted 40 days. The total of lodging, meal, venue, materials, transportation, and other expenses was RMB 29,250. The "Fudan University Detailed List of Training Expense Expenditures," the trainee list, and the invoices provided by the training service provider were all complete, and the portion exceeding 30 days was 10 days. The reception portion was organized under the domestic official hospitality one-matter, one-settlement method, with 9 visitors and 3 accompanying staff members. No lodging expense was claimed separately. The working meal was controlled at RMB 100 per person per day, and the formal banquet was arranged at RMB 150 per person per occasion. However, either the official letter or the "Fudan University Domestic Official Hospitality Approval Form" was missing.
Among the two travel cases, one had an actual reimbursement recipient who was an invited external person, so the transportation and lodging standard had been confirmed by the project leader. The other had the responsible person's signature and official seal complete, but a lump-sum city transportation allowance of RMB 500 was claimed. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form".

case_ch:
In June 2026, the school centrally submitted several sets of receipts from different sources, including one set of research travel receipts, three small purchases, and the materials for a two-day conference.
The travel portion already included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form," with the responsible person's signature and official seal complete. The itinerary covered 3 calendar days, with 2 nights of lodging at RMB 700 per night, a meal subsidy of RMB 300 was claimed, and city transportation expenses of RMB 180 were reimbursed on an actual basis. The intercity transportation receipts and the lodging invoice were both provided. Among the small purchases, one was office stationery, another was office stationery and office furniture, and the third was office stationery and computer accessories. All three sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list.
The conference materials were organized under the category of conference activities supported by research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 2 days. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging but did not uniformly arrange meals, and the remaining conference expenses converted to about RMB 650 per person per day. The full set of conference materials was complete.

case_ch:
In June 2026, the school submitted together in one batch the payment materials for a renovation project, the cost review documents, equipment maintenance receipts, and two small purchases.
The engineering portion exceeded RMB 100,000 in amount. The original approval form and related review seals were all complete, and the payment amount was controlled according to the contract and project progress, with no overpayment. However, because the amount had reached the threshold requiring university leader approval, the materials still lacked the signature of the vice president in charge. The cost review materials submitted together with the project already included the cost review opinion, and the claimed amount matched the portion to be borne by the university. However, the engineering or equipment invoice was not provided. Another equipment maintenance matter had already been applied for through the Asset Management Office system, and the "Fudan University Fixed Asset Maintenance Application Form" had been printed out, with the relevant signatures and the official seal of the unit, and the original invoice for the maintenance service was complete.
Among the small purchases, one was office stationery and computer accessories, and the other was office stationery. Both sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list. The accompanying cost review file explicitly included the "Fudan University Construction Project Cost Review Opinion".

case_ch:
In September 2026, in order to build a remote exchange platform, the school centrally processed a batch of expenses related to an online academic activity, including equipment purchase materials, one conference organization expense, the round-trip transportation and lodging receipts of the debugging personnel, one high-standard remuneration case, and small purchases.
The purchase portion had already submitted a purchased materials warehousing confirmation form. However, according to the reported category, this physical item was neither managed under the fixed asset standard nor under the intangible asset standard. The conference portion was charged to research project funds and was organized under the Category I conference scale, with about 100 participants and a duration of 2 days. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging at about RMB 500 per person per day, the conference did not uniformly arrange meals, and the remaining conference expenses converted to about RMB 650 per person per day. The notice and agenda, budget form, detailed list of conference expense expenditures, sign-in sheet, and service contract or agreement were all complete. The debugging personnel's trip was organized using the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form," with the responsible person's signature and official seal complete, and the related receipts were provided. However, self-driving or car rental was also used on this trip, with fuel and tolls totaling RMB 200.
The remuneration materials listed 6 doctoral dissertation reviewers, 6 defense committee members, and 1 defense secretary, with the corresponding standards of RMB 450, RMB 400, and RMB 150 per person respectively. There was also a purchase of office stationery, newspapers, and magazines, and the seller provided a sales list together with the invoice.

case_ch:
In August 2026, the school handled in one submission several materials from unrelated matters, including one overseas travel expense, one set of academic remuneration, and three small purchases.
The overseas portion was reported under the category of official overseas travel supported by non-research funds. The traveler was division-level or lower personnel, and the air ticket was purchased according to the economy-class standard. The foreign affairs approval and the overseas expense reimbursement form were both attached, and the expense form listed the registration fee, living allowance, incidental expenses, and transportation expenses. The remuneration materials included both a master's dissertation defense and arrangements for an academician lecture and on-site consulting: there were 2 reviewers, 3 defense committee members, and 1 defense secretary, with the corresponding standards of RMB 250, RMB 250, and RMB 100 per person respectively; the academician lecture covered 4 class hours at RMB 1,500 per class hour; and there was also an on-site consulting arrangement lasting 3 days, with consulting fees paid at RMB 450 per day.
Among the small purchases, two were office stationery, one of which involved artificial splitting of invoice amounts, and the third was office stationery, newspapers, and magazines. All three sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list.

case_ch:
In July 2026, the school submitted together several sets of materials that were originally unrelated, including one consecutive training program, one family visit transportation expense, and three small purchases.
The training portion was reported under the standard for division-level and lower personnel and lasted 25 days. The total of lodging, meal, venue, materials, transportation, and other expenses was RMB 16,950, including lecturer fees of RMB 1,200, together with reimbursement for an out-of-town lecturer's lodging of RMB 340, meal expenses of RMB 130, and transportation of RMB 500. The "Fudan University Detailed List of Training Expense Expenditures" and the trainee list were both complete, and a separate written approval was attached for the portion involving an increased standard. However, the invoices provided by the training service provider were not submitted. The family visit portion was reported under the category of an unmarried employee making the once-a-year visit to parents. The actual expense was RMB 800, and the reimbursable amount claimed was also RMB 800. The expenses included intercity transportation, and the family visit application form had completed departmental approval and had been affixed with the seal of the personnel department.
Among the small purchases, one was office stationery, newspapers, and magazines; another was office stationery and involved artificial splitting of invoice amounts; and the third was office stationery and computer accessories. All three sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list.

case_ch:
In September 2026, the school centrally submitted several sets of activity materials from different sources, including one domestic official hospitality case, one overseas visitor reception case, one short lecture remuneration case, and two travel cases.
The on-campus reception portion was organized under the domestic official hospitality one-matter, one-settlement method. The official letter from the visiting unit, the "Fudan University Domestic Official Hospitality List," and the "Fudan University Domestic Official Hospitality Approval Form" were all complete. There were 9 visitors and 3 accompanying staff members. No lodging expense was claimed separately. The working meal was controlled at RMB 100 per person per day, and the formal banquet was arranged at RMB 150 per person per occasion. The overseas visitor reception portion had already completed foreign affairs filing, and the "Fudan University Overseas Expert Work Expense Accounting Report" had been submitted. The guests were arranged in a four-star hotel under the category for guests of other ranks, and the reimbursement simultaneously included lodging, intercity transportation, routine meal expenses, banquet expenses, local transportation, gifts, and meal allowance subsidies for staff working overtime. Routine meal expenses were controlled at RMB 320 per person per day, and the banquet was arranged at RMB 280 per person per occasion. The remuneration materials included no dissertation review or defense fees and no expert consulting fees, but only one special lecture by division-level and lower personnel, covering 2 class hours at RMB 400 per class hour.
Among the two travel cases, one was for the person in charge's own trip and had been countersigned by another university leader, with a lump-sum city transportation allowance of RMB 240 claimed. The other was reported under the standard for ordinary business travelers, with a lodging standard of RMB 700 per night and complete receipts. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form".

case_ch:
In August 2026, the school centrally submitted several sets of materials from different sources, including one equipment maintenance case, one set of research travel receipts, and three small purchases.
The equipment maintenance matter had already been applied for through the Asset Management Office system, and the "Fudan University Fixed Asset Maintenance Application Form" had been printed out. The form bore the signatures of the relevant personnel and had been affixed with the official seal of the unit, and the original invoice for the maintenance service was complete. In the related travel materials, both the intercity transportation receipts and the lodging invoice were provided, and the responsible person's signature and official seal were complete. However, the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form" and the corresponding business trip approval and itinerary materials were not attached.
Among the small purchases, one was office stationery and computer accessories, one was office stationery and drinking water, and one was standalone office stationery. All three sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list.

case_ch:
In October 2026, the school handled in one submission the organization expenses of one conference activity, two sets of academic support expenditures, and two small purchases.
The conference portion was organized under the category of conference activities supported by research funds, at a scale of about 100 participants and a duration of 2 days. Conference services uniformly arranged lodging and meals, with lodging at about RMB 480 per person per day, meals at about RMB 150 per person per day, and other expenses at about RMB 100 per person per day, for a total of about RMB 730 per person per day. However, the notice and agenda were not submitted with the package. The remuneration materials included no dissertation review or defense fees and no expert consulting fees, but only one special lecture by bureau-level personnel, covering 4 class hours at RMB 1,200 per class hour.
Among the small purchases, one was office stationery and computer accessories, another was office stationery, and another was office stationery and office furniture. All three sets of materials were accompanied by a sales list.

case_ch:
In June 2026, when the renovation of the laboratory animal facility reached a payment stage, the handling staff member brought together to Finance the project payment materials, the accompanying cost review documents, the maintenance receipts for an autoclave in the same area, and two small purchases made later while organizing materials.
The renovation project amount exceeded RMB 100,000. The original approval form, related review seals, the signature of the head of the Capital Construction Office, and the signature of the vice president in charge were all complete. This application followed the initial payment process, the original construction contract had also been submitted, and the payment amount was controlled according to the contract and project progress, with no overpayment. The cost review materials submitted together with the project already included the cost review opinion, the engineering or equipment invoice had been provided, the claimed amount matched the portion to be borne by the university, the portion to be borne by the construction contractor had been listed separately, and a copy of the contractor's invoice had also been provided. Another equipment maintenance matter had already been applied for through the Asset Management Office system, and the "Fudan University Fixed Asset Maintenance Application Form" had been printed out, with the relevant signatures and the official seal of the unit, and the original invoice for the maintenance service was complete.
In another set of travel materials, the intercity transportation receipts were missing although the lodging invoice had been provided. Among the small purchases, one was office stationery and office furniture, and the other was office stationery and cleaning supplies, with the latter formed through online shopping and accompanied by the online shopping transaction detail record. The related travel file explicitly included the "Fudan University Business Trip Report Form". The accompanying cost review file explicitly included the "Fudan University Construction Project Cost Review Opinion".
